<a href="#suppliers" class="toc-h1 toc-link" data-title="Suppliers">Suppliers</a>
<ul class="toc-list-h2">
<li>
<a href="#getting-suppliers" class="toc-h2 toc-link" data-title="Getting suppliers">Getting suppliers</a>
</li>
<li>
<a href="#add-a-supplier" class="toc-h2 toc-link" data-title="Add a supplier">Add a supplier</a>
</li>
<li>
<a href="#delete-a-supplier" class="toc-h2 toc-link" data-title="Delete a supplier">Delete a supplier</a>
</li>
<li>
<a href="#change-a-supplier" class="toc-h2 toc-link" data-title="Change a supplier">Change a supplier</a>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<a href="#tax" class="toc-h1 toc-link" data-title="Tax">Tax</a>
<ul class="toc-list-h2">
<li>
<a href="#get-all-tax-classes" class="toc-h2 toc-link" data-title="Get all tax classes">Get all tax classes</a>
</li>
<li>
<a href="#get-a-single-tax-class" class="toc-h2 toc-link" data-title="Get a single tax class">Get a single tax class</a>
</li>
<li>
<a href="#add-a-tax-class" class="toc-h2 toc-link" data-title="Add a tax class">Add a tax class</a>
</li>
<li>
<a href="#change-a-tax-class" class="toc-h2 toc-link" data-title="Change a tax class">Change a tax class</a>
</li>
<li>
<a href="#remove-a-tax-class" class="toc-h2 toc-link" data-title="Remove a tax class">Remove a tax class</a>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<a href="#webhooks" class="toc-h1 toc-link" data-title="Webhooks">Webhooks</a>
<ul class="toc-list-h2">
<li>
<a href="#configuring-webhooks" class="toc-h2 toc-link" data-title="Configuring webhooks">Configuring webhooks</a>
</li>
<li>
<a href="#securing-webhooks" class="toc-h2 toc-link" data-title="Securing webhooks">Securing webhooks</a>
</li>
<li>
<a href="#supported-events" class="toc-h2 toc-link" data-title="Supported events">Supported events</a>
</li>
<li>
<a href="#event-data" class="toc-h2 toc-link" data-title="Event data">Event data</a>
</li>

<a href="#get-all-webhooks" class="toc-h2 toc-link" data-title="Get all webhooks">Get all webhooks</a>
</li>

<a href="#add-a-webhook" class="toc-h2 toc-link" data-title="Add a webhook">Add a webhook</a>
</li>

<a href="#change-webhooks" class="toc-h2 toc-link" data-title="Change webhooks">Change webhooks</a>
</li>

<li><a href='https://github.com/slatedocs/slate'>Documentation Powered by Slate</a></li>

</div>
<div class="page-wrapper">
<div class="dark-box"></div>
<div class="content">
<h1 id='introduction'>Introduction</h1>
<p>Welcome to the Sello API v5! You can use our API to access Sello API endpoints, which can get and change information on orders, products and settings.</p>

<p>We have code samples in Shell/curl, and PHP. You can view code examples in the dark area to the right, and you can switch the programming language of the examples with the tabs in the top right.</p>
<h1 id='authentication'>Authentication</h1>
<blockquote>
<p>To authorize, use this code:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'api_endpoint_here'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_USERPWD</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'meowmeowmeow'</span><span class="p">);</span>
</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code><span class="c"># With shell, you can just pass the correct header with each request</span>
curl <span class="s2">"api_endpoint_here"</span>
<span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>Make sure to replace <code>meowmeowmeow</code> with your API key.</p>
</blockquote>

<p>Sello uses API keys to allow access to the API. You can register a new API key in your <a href="http://bo2.sello.io/settings/developers/api">account settings</a>.</p>

<p>Sello expects for the API key to be included in all API requests to the server in a header that looks like the following:</p>

<p><code>Authorization: meowmeowmeow</code></p>

<aside class="notice">
You must replace <code>meowmeowmeow</code> with your personal API key.
</aside>
<h1 id='localization'>Localization</h1>
<p>Most resouces are able to return localized content (error messages, data etc). To specify your preferred language, use <code>Accept-Language</code> header. If your language is unsupported, English will be used.</p>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'api_endpoint_here'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_USERPWD</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'meowmeowmeow'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="s1">'Accept-Language: en'</span><span class="p">]);</span>
</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="s2">"api_endpoint_here"</span>
<span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Accept-Language: en"</span>
</code></pre></div><h1 id='best-practices'>Best Practices</h1>
<p>You are highly encouraged to build your system asynchronous, meaning every request that doesn&#39;t require an immediate response should be internally enqueued and processed in order.</p>
<h2 id='rate-limits'>Rate limits</h2>
<p>The API is by default limited to 30 calls per minute. You may request an increase at support@sello.io. In every request you&#39;ll recieve three headers containing information about your rate limit:</p>

<ul>
<li><code>X-RateLimit-Limit</code>: What your rate limit is (30 by default)</li>
<li><code>X-RateLimit-Reset</code>: When the current limit expires - meaning when you will get re-filled with requests</li>
<li><code>X-RateLimit-Remaining</code>: How many requests you can still do until being throttled</li>
</ul>
<h1 id='account'>Account</h1><h2 id='get-account-information'>Get account information</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/account"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/account"</span> <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command returns JSON structured like this:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"is_agent"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"1"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"currency"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"SEK"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"zip"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"10202"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"average_sales"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"13512"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"setup_completed"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"1"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"email"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"support@sello.io"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"country"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"SE"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"beta"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"0"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"city"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Stockholm"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"invoices"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"overdue"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[],</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"unpaid"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="s2">"Kf7gWr6"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"referrer"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"0"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"company"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Chrille AB"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"notes"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">""</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"8346"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"phone"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"07012345667"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"vat_number"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"556688-8880"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"flags"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"H"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"created_at"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2009-02-12 14:05:04"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"invoice_email"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"invoices@sello.io"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"industry_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">null</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"address"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"King Street 8"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"paid_to"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2020-12-12"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"type"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"commission"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint will retrieve information about the callee&#39;s account.</p>
<h3 id='http-request'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/account</code></p>
<h2 id='stats-summary'>Stats: Summary</h2>
<p>Stats is updated nightly and returned in currency according to your settings.</p>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/account/stats"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/account/stats"</span> <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command returns JSON structured like this:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"purchasecost"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"previous"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">770543</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"current"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">635759</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"numorders"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"previous"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">5460</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"current"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">4662</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"ordervalue"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"previous"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mf">367.27</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"current"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mf">359.02</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"turnover"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"previous"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mf">1568013.27</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"current"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mf">1248030.49</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>Will return a breif summary of important stats the current 30 days and a comparison value for the previous 30 days.</p>

<table><thead>
<tr>
<th>Field</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead><tbody>
<tr>
<td>purchasecost</td>
<td>The total purchase cost (product purchase cost &times; amount sold)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>numorders</td>
<td>Total amount of orders</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>ordervalue</td>
<td>Average order total</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>turnover</td>
<td>Total sales</td>
</tr>
</tbody></table>
<h3 id='http-request'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/account/stats</code></p>
<h2 id='stats-daily-turnover'>Stats: Daily turnover</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/account/stats/turnover/daily"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/account/stats/turnover/daily"</span> <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command returns JSON structured like this:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"0"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mf">4238.07</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"10108"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">2467</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"13159"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mf">39373.99</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"14333"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mf">10524.2</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"14803"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">4833</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"date"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2017-02-27"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"0"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mf">7518.27</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"10108"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">2465</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"13159"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mf">30993.48</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"14333"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mf">7488.4</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"14803"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">3948</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"35043"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">223</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"date"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2017-02-28"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"0"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mf">5567.85</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"10108"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">1905</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"13159"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mf">29419.64</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"14333"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mf">7510.7</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"14803"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">4580</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"35043"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">507</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"date"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2017-03-01"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"0"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mf">4780.34</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"10108"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">2208</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"13159"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mf">23110.73</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"14333"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mf">4502.4</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"14803"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">7962</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"32778"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">944</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"35043"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">355</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"date"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2017-03-02"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>Daily turnover the past 30 days, per integration. The key of the object is integration id, the value is the turnover. Integration 0 means &quot;custom&quot; order that has been made outside a marketplace.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-2'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/account/stats/turnover/daily</code></p>
<h2 id='stats-monthly-turnover'>Stats: Monthly turnover</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/account/stats/turnover/monthly"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/account/stats/turnover/monthly"</span> <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command returns JSON structured like this:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"10108"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mf">4768.8</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"13159"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mf">34029.35</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"14333"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mf">9233.8</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"14803"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">35292</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"date"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2016-03"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"0"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mf">13395.17</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"10108"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mf">30119.2</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"13159"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mf">482521.60</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"14333"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mf">96822.72</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"14803"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mf">278363.2</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"32778"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mf">4935.04</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"date"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2016-04"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"0"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mf">15687.6</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"10108"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">45848</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"13159"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mf">391407.64</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"14333"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mf">143643.2</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"14803"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mf">286581.03</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"32778"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">7823</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"date"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2016-05"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>Monthly turnover the past year, per integration. The key of the object is integration id, the value is the turnover. Integration 0 means &quot;custom&quot; order that has been made outside a marketplace.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-3'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/account/stats/turnover/monthly</code></p>
<h2 id='stats-stockworth'>Stats: Stockworth</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/account/stats/stockworth"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/account/stats/stockworth"</span> <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command returns JSON structured like this:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"date"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2017-03-27"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"worth"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">1994793</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"date"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2017-03-28"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"worth"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">2004693</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"date"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2017-03-29"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"worth"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">1992246</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>The worth of your inventory per day.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-4'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/account/stats/stockworth</code></p>
<h2 id='stats-status'>Stats: Status</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/account/stats/status"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/account/stats/status"</span> <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command returns JSON structured like this:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"status_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2586859"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"num"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">8</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"status_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2612307"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"num"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">115</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"status_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2622237"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"num"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">2</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"status_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2625725"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"num"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">8</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"status_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2628202"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"num"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">2</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>Number of active orders per status</p>
<h3 id='http-request-5'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/account/stats/status</code></p>
<h2 id='stats-topsellers'>Stats: Topsellers</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/account/stats/topsellers"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/account/stats/topsellers"</span> <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command returns JSON structured like this:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"image_url_small"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"http://stat.sello.nu/item/98/6dd.jpg"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"product_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"422443"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"product_name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"David Beckham Intimately For Him Edt 75ml"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"num_sold"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"116"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"image_url_small"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"http://stat.sello.nu/item/984ui4kj.jpg"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"product_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"424556"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"product_name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"David Beckham Homme Edt 75ml"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"num_sold"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"42"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"image_url_small"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"https://images.sello.io/product/b57/c12b50b574ecf3c6c659de59.jpg"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"product_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"65322"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"product_name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Burberry Brit Rhythm Men Edt 50ml"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"num_sold"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"34"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"image_url_small"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"https://images.sello.io/product/80e/e3c4cc80ee4251d451e749d3fde.jpg"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"product_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"5555444"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"product_name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Elizabeth Arden Mediterranean Edp 100ml"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"num_sold"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"34"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"image_url_small"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"http://stat.sello.nu/item/98/609.jpg"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"product_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"34555"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"product_name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"David Beckham The Essence Edt 75ml"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"num_sold"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"23"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>Your 5 top most sold products the past month.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-6'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/account/stats/topsellers</code></p>
<h1 id='auctions'>Auctions</h1>
<p>To create autions or fixed price-items on for example Tradera and eBay, you first add your products to the outbox. Once in the outbox, you can specify publishing times, prices etc. To publish the auctions, you publish the outbox.</p>
<h2 id='adding-products-to-the-outbox'>Adding products to the outbox</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/outbox/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">integrationId</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'{"productIds":[123, 456]}'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> POST <span class="nt">-d</span> <span class="s1">'{"productIds":[123, 456]}'</span> https://api.sello.io/v5/outbox/<span class="o">{</span>integrationId<span class="o">}</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>201</code> and return the id&#39;s of the outbox items:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"ids"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">14475806</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">14475807</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>Add products to the outbox of a specified integration.</p>
<h3 id='http-request'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>POST https://api.sello.io/v5/outbox/{integrationId}</code></p>
<h2 id='listing-items-in-the-outbox'>Listing items in the outbox</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/outbox/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">integrationId</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> https://api.sello.io/v5/outbox/<span class="o">{</span>integrationId<span class="o">}</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>200</code> and an array of outbox items:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"buynow_price"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">13</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"duration"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">30</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">1799011</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"options"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[],</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"product"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"category"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Photo, Cameras &amp; Optics &gt; Analog Cameras &gt; Camcorders"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">43609235</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"image"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"https://images.sello.io/products/d5b2b58f01dd4dd82c63b95fd222dfb5.jpg"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"My product name"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"reservation_price"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">12</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"scheduled_time"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2020-05-26T11:40:42.280Z"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"start_price"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"type"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"buynow"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>Show items in the outbox.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-2'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/outbox/{integrationId}</code></p>
<h2 id='publish-the-outbox'>Publish the outbox</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/outbox/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">integrationId</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">/publish"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'[{"buynow_price":13,"duration":30,"id":1799011,"options":[],"product":{"category":"Photo, Cameras &amp; Optics &gt; Analog Cameras &gt; Camcorders","id":43609235,"image":"https://images.sello.io/products/d5b2b58f01dd4dd82c63b95fd222dfb5.jpg","name":"test product"},"reservation_price":12,"scheduled_time":"2020-05-26T11:40:42.280Z","start_price":1,"type":"buynow"}]'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> POST <span class="nt">-d</span> <span class="s1">'[{"buynow_price":13,"duration":30,"id":1799011,"options":[],"product":{"category":"Photo, Cameras &amp; Optics &gt; Analog Cameras &gt; Camcorders","id":43609235,"image":"https://images.sello.io/products/d5b2b58f01dd4dd82c63b95fd222dfb5.jpg","name":"test product"},"reservation_price":12,"scheduled_time":"2020-05-26T11:40:42.280Z","start_price":1,"type":"buynow"}]'</span> https://api.sello.io/v5/outbox/<span class="o">{</span>integrationId<span class="o">}</span>/publish
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>201</code> on success.</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">{</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nl">"message"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Items have been added to queue"</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>Publish the supplied items. The items should have the same format as when you GET outbox.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-3'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>POST https://api.sello.io/v5/outbox/{integrationId}/publish</code></p>
<h2 id='delete-an-outbox-item'>Delete an outbox item</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/outbox/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">integrationId}/item/{id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'DELETE'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>
</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> DELETE https://api.sello.io/v5/outbox/<span class="o">{</span>integrationId<span class="o">}</span>/item/<span class="o">{</span><span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">}</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>200</code> if successful</p>
</blockquote>

<p>This endpoint will remove an item from the outbox.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-4'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>DELETE https://api.sello.io/v5/outbox/{integrationId}/item/{id}</code></p>
<h1 id='categories'>Categories</h1><h2 id='get-sello-categories'>Get Sello categories</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/categories/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">parent</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/categories/{parent}"</span> <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command returns JSON structured like this:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"340208"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"parent"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"161201"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"map"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"1"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"340208"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Dam"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"crumb"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Accessoarer &amp;gt; Solglasögon &amp;gt; Dam"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"6"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"6313"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Dam"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"crumb"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Mode &amp;gt; Accessoarer &amp;gt; Solglasögon &amp; Glasögon &amp;gt; Solglasögon &amp;gt; Dam"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"path"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="s2">"1612"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="s2">"161201"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="s2">"340208"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">],</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Dam"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"crumb"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Accessoarer &amp;gt; Solglasögon &amp;gt; Dam"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="err">...</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>Sello categories are our own internal categories, these categories are mapped against marketplace and webshop categories. The advantage is that you only need to choose one category, and then mapping take care of the rest. Mappings are constantly learned/updated.</p>
<h3 id='http-request'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/categories/{parent}</code></p>
<h3 id='data'>Data</h3>
<table><thead>
<tr>
<th>Parameter</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead><tbody>
<tr>
<td>parent</td>
<td>Parent category id to fetch subcategories from. Use 0 to fetch root categories</td>
</tr>
</tbody></table>
<h3 id='localization'>Localization</h3>
<p>Use <code>Accept-Language</code> header to specify your preferred language. Currently supported languages are: en, sv, no, da, fi, de</p>
<h2 id='getting-subcategories-for-an-integration'>Getting subcategories for an integration</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/categories/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">integration}/{parent</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/categories/{integration}/{parent}"</span> <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command returns JSON structured like this:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"10"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Vehicles, Boats &amp; Parts"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"crumb"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Vehicles, Boats &amp; Parts"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"parent_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"0"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"path"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="s2">"0"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="s2">"10"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"11"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Books &amp; Magazines"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"crumb"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Books &amp; Magazines"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"parent_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"0"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"path"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="s2">"0"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="s2">"11"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"12"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Computers &amp; Accessories"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"crumb"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Computers &amp; Accessories"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"parent_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"0"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"path"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="s2">"0"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="s2">"12"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint will retrieve all subcategories for an integration and the parent id you specify.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-2'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/categories/{integration}/{parent}</code></p>
<h3 id='data-2'>Data</h3>
<table><thead>
<tr>
<th>Parameter</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead><tbody>
<tr>
<td>integration</td>
<td>The integration id you want to fetch categories from</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>parent</td>
<td>Parent category id to fetch subcategories from. Use 0 to fetch root categories</td>
</tr>
</tbody></table>
<h3 id='localization-2'>Localization</h3>
<p>Use <code>Accept-Language</code> header to specify your preferred language. Currently supported languages are: en, sv, no, da, fi, de</p>
<h2 id='getting-a-single-category-for-an-integration'>Getting a single category for an integration</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/categories/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">integration}/{id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">/info"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/categories/{integration}/{id}/info"</span> <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command returns JSON structured like this:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"10"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Vehicles, Boats &amp; Parts"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"crumb"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Vehicles, Boats &amp; Parts"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"parent_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"0"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"path"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="s2">"0"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="s2">"10"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint will retrieve a single category an integration.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-3'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/categories/{integration}/{id}/info</code></p>
<h3 id='data-3'>Data</h3>
<table><thead>
<tr>
<th>Parameter</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead><tbody>
<tr>
<td>integration</td>
<td>The integration id you want to fetch categories from</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>id</td>
<td>Category id to fetch information about.</td>
</tr>
</tbody></table>
<h3 id='localization-3'>Localization</h3>
<p>Use <code>Accept-Language</code> header to specify your preferred language. Currently supported languages are: en, sv, no, da, fi, de</p>
<h2 id='getting-a-single-sello-category-information'>Getting a single Sello category information</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/categories/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">/info"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
