<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/categories/{id}/info"</span> <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command returns JSON structured like this:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"340210"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"parent"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"161201"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"map"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"1"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"340210"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Unisex"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"crumb"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Accessoarer &amp;gt; Solglasögon &amp;gt; Unisex"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"6"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"512"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Solglasögon"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"crumb"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Mode &amp;gt; Accessoarer &amp;gt; Solglasögon &amp; Glasögon &amp;gt; Solglasögon"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"10"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"225"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Sunglasses"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"crumb"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"ClothingAccessories &gt; GlassesAndShades &gt; Sunglasses"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"13"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"5332207031"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Unisex"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"crumb"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Baby Products &amp;gt; Baby Clothing &amp;gt; Unisex"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"path"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="s2">"1612"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="s2">"161201"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="s2">"340210"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">],</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Unisex"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"crumb"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Accessoarer &amp;gt; Solglasögon &amp;gt; Unisex"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint will retrieve a single Sello category.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-4'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/categories/{integration}/{id}/info</code></p>
<h3 id='data-4'>Data</h3>
<table><thead>
<tr>
<th>Parameter</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead><tbody>
<tr>
<td>integration</td>
<td>The integration id you want to fetch categories from</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>id</td>
<td>Category id to fetch information about.</td>
</tr>
</tbody></table>
<h3 id='localization-4'>Localization</h3>
<p>Use <code>Accept-Language</code> header to specify your preferred language. Currently supported languages are: en, sv, no, da, fi, de</p>
<h1 id='import'>Import</h1>
<p>Sello support multiple ways of importing products and orders to the platform. See respective section:</p>
<h2 id='products-fyndiq'>Products: Fyndiq</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/import/products/fyndiq/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">integration</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> POST https://api.sello.io/v5/import/products/fyndiq/<span class="o">{</span>integration<span class="o">}</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>202</code> to inform that the import has been triggered. The import will be processed in the background.</p>
</blockquote>
<h3 id='http-request'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>POST https://api.sello.io/v5/import/products/fyndiq/{integration}</code></p>

<p>Replace <code>integration</code> with the integration id you wish to import from.</p>
<h2 id='products-woocommerce'>Products: Woocommerce</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/import/products/woocommerce/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">integration</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> POST https://api.sello.io/v5/import/products/woocommerce/<span class="o">{</span>integration<span class="o">}</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>202</code> to inform that the import has been triggered. The import will be processed in the background.</p>
</blockquote>
<h3 id='http-request-2'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>POST https://api.sello.io/v5/import/products/woocommerce/{integration}</code></p>

<p>Replace <code>integration</code> with the integration id you wish to import from.</p>
<h2 id='products-xlsx'>Products: Xlsx</h2><h3 id='importing-a-file'>Importing a file</h3><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$client</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="k">new</span> <span class="err">\</span><span class="nf">GuzzleHttp\Client</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nv">$client</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="nf">post</span><span class="p">(</span>
<span class="s1">'https://api.sello.io/v5/import/products/csv'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'headers'</span> <span class="o">=&gt;</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization'</span> <span class="o">=&gt;</span> <span class="s1">'meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]</span>
<span class="s1">'multipart'</span> <span class="o">=&gt;</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'name'</span> <span class="o">=&gt;</span> <span class="s1">'file'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'contents'</span> <span class="o">=&gt;</span> <span class="nb">fopen</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s1">'/path/to/file.xlsx'</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'r'</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="p">],</span>
<span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'name'</span> <span class="o">=&gt;</span> <span class="s1">'payload'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'contents'</span> <span class="o">=&gt;</span> <span class="nb">json_encode</span><span class="p">(</span>
<span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'mode'</span> <span class="o">=&gt;</span> <span class="s1">'create'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'integrations'</span> <span class="o">=&gt;</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'tradera'</span> <span class="o">=&gt;</span> <span class="mi">4</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'fyndiq'</span> <span class="o">=&gt;</span> <span class="mi">19</span>
<span class="p">]</span>
<span class="p">]</span>
<span class="p">)</span>
<span class="p">]</span>
<span class="p">]</span>
<span class="p">]</span>
<span class="p">);</span>

<span class="nv">$body</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nv">$response</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="nf">getBody</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nv">$response</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="nf">getStatusCode</span><span class="p">();</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> POST <span class="nt">-F</span> <span class="s2">"file=@/path/to/file.xlsx"</span> <span class="nt">-d</span> <span class="s2">"payload={'mode':'create', 'integrations': {'tradera': 4, 'fyndiq': 19}}"</span> https://api.sello.io/v5/import/products/xlsx
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>201</code> and how many rows in the xlsx file were processed.</p>
</blockquote>
<h3 id='http-request-3'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>POST https://api.sello.io/v5/import/products/xlsx</code></p>

<p>Upload the xlsx file called <code>file</code> and send json payload as <code>payload</code> start either an import or an update of products depending on <code>mode</code>. </p>

<table><thead>
<tr>
<th>Parameter</th>
<th>Required?</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead><tbody>
<tr>
<td>file</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>The xlsx file upload (see example)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>payload</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>JSON object with attributes: <code>mode</code> either <code>create</code> or <code>update</code>. <code>integrations</code> should be an object with market name to integration id, like <code>{&quot;tradera&quot;:4}</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody></table>
<h2 id='products-csv'>Products: CSV</h2><h3 id='creating-an-import-session'>Creating an import session</h3><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$client</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="k">new</span> <span class="err">\</span><span class="nf">GuzzleHttp\Client</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nv">$client</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="nf">post</span><span class="p">(</span>
<span class="s1">'https://api.sello.io/v5/import/products/csv'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'headers'</span> <span class="o">=&gt;</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization'</span> <span class="o">=&gt;</span> <span class="s1">'meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]</span>
<span class="s1">'multipart'</span> <span class="o">=&gt;</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'name'</span> <span class="o">=&gt;</span> <span class="s1">'file'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'contents'</span> <span class="o">=&gt;</span> <span class="nb">fopen</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s1">'/path/to/file.csv'</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'r'</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="p">]</span>
<span class="p">]</span>
<span class="p">]</span>
<span class="p">);</span>

<span class="nv">$body</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nv">$response</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="nf">getBody</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nv">$response</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="nf">getStatusCode</span><span class="p">();</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> POST <span class="nt">-F</span> <span class="s2">"file=@/path/to/file.csv"</span> https://api.sello.io/v5/import/products/csv
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>201</code> and data about the processed file. To start the import, you need to <code>POST</code> to start (see below).</p>
</blockquote>
<h3 id='http-request-4'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>POST https://api.sello.io/v5/import/products/csv</code></p>

<p>Upload the csv file called <code>file</code>. This will generate a import session and return the first 5 lines of parsed data in your csv file. Use this data to map the fields and issue <code>POST</code> to <code>start</code> (see below).</p>
<h3 id='starting-an-import-session'>Starting an import session</h3><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$client</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="k">new</span> <span class="err">\</span><span class="nf">GuzzleHttp\Client</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nv">$client</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="nf">post</span><span class="p">(</span>
<span class="s1">'https://api.sello.io/v5/import/products/csv/123456/start'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'body'</span> <span class="o">=&gt;</span> <span class="nb">json_encode</span><span class="p">([</span>
<span class="s1">'mode'</span> <span class="o">=&gt;</span> <span class="s1">'create'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'map'</span> <span class="o">=&gt;</span> <span class="p">[]</span> <span class="c1">// The field mapping</span>
<span class="p">])</span>
<span class="p">]</span>
<span class="p">);</span>

<span class="nv">$body</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nv">$response</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="nf">getBody</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nv">$response</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="nf">getStatusCode</span><span class="p">();</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> POST <span class="nt">-d</span> <span class="s1">'{"mode":"create", "map":[]'</span> https://api.sello.io/v5/import/products/csv/123456/start
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>202</code> to indicate that the file has been put in queue for processing with your supplied mapping.</p>
</blockquote>
<h3 id='http-request-5'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>POST https://api.sello.io/v5/import/products/csv/{session}/start</code></p>
<h3 id='data'>Data</h3>
<table><thead>
<tr>
<th>Parameter</th>
<th>Required?</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead><tbody>
<tr>
<td>map</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>Column mapping</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>mode</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td><code>create</code> if the import should create new products, <code>update</code> if products should be updated</td>
</tr>
</tbody></table>
<h1 id='integrations'>Integrations</h1>
<p>An integration is the term for a connection between Sello and a service. These integrations generally contains API credentials and integration-specific settings.</p>
<h2 id='getting-all-integrations'>Getting all integrations</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/integrations"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/integrations"</span> <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command returns JSON structured like this:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">4</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"user_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">8346</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"market_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"market_user_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"123"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"market_token"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"abc-my-secret-token"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"extra"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"1"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"endpoint"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">""</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"display_name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Tradera"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"created_at"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2014-10-01T13:08:09.000Z"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"last_order_check"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2017-10-25T08:40:15.000Z"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"expires_at"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2016-02-29T11:44:21.000Z"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"status_id_paid"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">null</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"status_id_unpaid"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">null</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"status"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"active"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"status_updated"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2014-11-20T13:04:30.000Z"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"sandbox"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"version"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">null</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"type"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"marketplace"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"initials"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"TRAD"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"parent_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint will retrieve all integrations on an account.</p>
<h3 id='http-request'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/integrations</code></p>
<h2 id='getting-a-single-integration'>Getting a single integration</h2>
<p>To fetch a specific integration, use this endpoint:</p>

<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/integrations/{id}</code></p>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/integrations/4"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> https://api.sello.io/v5/integrations/4
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>200</code> and return the integration:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">4</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"user_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">8346</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"market_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"market_user_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"123"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"market_token"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"abc-my-secret-token"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"extra"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"1"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"endpoint"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">""</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"display_name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Tradera"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"created_at"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2014-10-01T13:08:09.000Z"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"last_order_check"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2017-10-25T08:40:15.000Z"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"expires_at"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2016-02-29T11:44:21.000Z"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"status_id_paid"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">null</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"status_id_unpaid"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">null</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"status"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"active"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"status_updated"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2014-11-20T13:04:30.000Z"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"sandbox"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"version"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">null</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"type"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"marketplace"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"initials"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"TRAD"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"parent_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint will retrieve an integration.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-2'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/integrations/{id}</code></p>
<h1 id='market'>Market</h1><h2 id='get-your-ebay-warehouses'>Get your eBay Warehouses</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/market/ebay/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">integration</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">/warehouses"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/market/ebay/{integration}/warehouses"</span> <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command returns an array of warehouses like this:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"default"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Warehouse-1"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"description"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Items ship from here."</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"address"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2055 Hamilton Ave"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"address2"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Building 3"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"city"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"San Jose"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"state"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"CA"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"zip"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"95125"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"country"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"US"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint will retrieve all warehouses created on your eBay account.</p>
<h3 id='http-request'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/market/ebay/{integration}/warehouses</code></p>
<h2 id='create-an-ebay-warehouse'>Create an eBay Warehouse</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/market/ebay/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">integration</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">/warehouses"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'{"name":"My warehouse" ... }'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> POST <span class="nt">-d</span> <span class="s1">'{"name":"My warehouse" ... }'</span> https://api.sello.io/v5/market/ebay/<span class="o">{</span>integration<span class="o">}</span>/warehouses
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>201</code> and the id:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"default"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint will create a new warehouse on your eBay account.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-2'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>https://api.sello.io/v5/market/ebay/{integration}/warehouses</code></p>
<h2 id='get-your-ebay-policies'>Get your eBay Policies</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/market/ebay/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">integration}/policies/{type</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/market/ebay/{integration}/policies/{type}"</span> <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>When type is payment:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"General policy"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"5571768000"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"methods"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"paymentMethodType"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"PAYPAL"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"recipientAccountReference"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"referenceType"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"PAYPAL_EMAIL"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"referenceId"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"support@sello.io"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>When type is fulfillment:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Standard policy"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"5570511000"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"handlingTime"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"value"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"unit"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"DAY"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>When type is return</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Return policy"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"5570529000"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"returnsAccepted"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"returnPeriod"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"value"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">30</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"unit"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"DAY"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"returnShippingCostPayer"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"SELLER"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint will retrieve all policies of a given type created on your eBay account.</p>
<h3 id='payment-policies'>Payment Policies</h3>
<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/market/ebay/{integration}/policies/payment</code></p>

<table><thead>
<tr>
<th>Field</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead><tbody>
<tr>
<td>name</td>
<td>Policy name (for interal use)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>id</td>
<td>autogenerated id</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>methods</td>
<td>An array of payment methods. Currently the only supported method is <code>PAYPAL</code>. To enable paypal, you must also pass your Paypal e-mail address in the <code>recipientAccountReference</code> object.</td>
</tr>
</tbody></table>
<h3 id='fulfillment-policies'>Fulfillment Policies</h3>
<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/market/ebay/{integration}/policies/fulfillment</code></p>

<table><thead>
<tr>
<th>Field</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead><tbody>
<tr>
<td>name</td>
<td>Policy name (for interal use)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>id</td>
<td>autogenerated id</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>handlingTime</td>
<td>An object containing value and unit for handling time. The only supported unit is currently <code>DAY</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody></table>
<h3 id='return-policies'>Return Policies</h3>
<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/market/ebay/{integration}/policies/return</code></p>

<table><thead>
<tr>
<th>Field</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead><tbody>
<tr>
<td>name</td>
<td>Policy name (for interal use)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>id</td>
<td>autogenerated id</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>returnsAccepted</td>
<td>A boolean if returns are accepted or not</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>returnPeriod</td>
<td>An object containing value and unit for return period. Acceptable values for <code>value</code> are 14, 30, 60.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>returnShippingCostPayer</td>
<td>Either BUYER or SELLER</td>
</tr>
</tbody></table>
<h2 id='create-an-ebay-policy'>Create an eBay Policy</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/market/ebay/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">integration}/policies/{type</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'{"name":"My policy" ... }'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> POST <span class="nt">-d</span> <span class="s1">'{"name":"My policy" ... }'</span> https://api.sello.io/v5/market/ebay/<span class="o">{</span>integration<span class="o">}</span>/policies
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>201</code> and the id:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"default"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint will create a new policy on your eBay account.</p>

<p>The payload should be constructed as the examples for <code>GET</code> above.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-3'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>https://api.sello.io/v5/market/ebay/{integration}/policies/{type}</code></p>
<h1 id='messages'>Messages</h1><h2 id='getting-number-of-unread-messages'>Getting number of unread messages</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/messages/count"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/messages/count"</span> <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command returns JSON structured like this:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"num"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">192</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint will return total number of unread messages.</p>
<h3 id='http-request'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/messages/count</code></p>
<h2 id='getting-messages'>Getting messages</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/messages"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/messages"</span> <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command returns JSON structured like this:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"total"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"messages"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"account"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">35648</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"message"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Product description is too long, max length is 7000 chars."</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"subject"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Too long description"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"severity"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"medium"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"item_reference"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">""</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"item_title"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Testing 123"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"item_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">35335339</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"code"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"TRADERA_TOO_LONG_DESCRIPTION"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"type"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"product"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"integration"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">36524</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"market"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"new"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"date"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2017-08-07T11:46:46.583Z"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"timestamp"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">1502106406583</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"AV28hM7U2qZ_2g5mdHSy"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint will retrieve your last 100 messages. Messages are automatically purged after 14 days.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-2'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/messages</code></p>
<h3 id='pagination'>Pagination</h3>
<p>To paginate, use <code>offset</code> to fetch messages by a different offset.</p>

<p>Examples:</p>

<p>Fetch messages 0-100:
<code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/messages?offset=0</code></p>

<p>Fetch messages 100-200:
<code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/messages?offset=100</code></p>

<p>Fetch messages 200-300:
<code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/messages?offset=200</code></p>
<h3 id='filtering'>Filtering</h3>
<p>The following fields supports filtering:</p>

<ul>
<li>severity</li>
<li>type</li>
<li>integration</li>
</ul>

<p>To filter, add <code>filter[{filter name}]=value</code> to the url. You can add one or many filters at once. For example:</p>

<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/messages?filter[type]=product&amp;filter[integration]=382</code></p>
<h3 id='searching'>Searching</h3>
<p>To search, add <code>search={query}</code> to the url. For example:</p>

<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/messages?search=stockholm</code></p>
<h2 id='set-messages-as-read'>Set messages as read</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/messages/read"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'{"ids":["id1", "id2"]}'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>
</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> POST https://api.sello.io/v5/messages/read <span class="nt">-d</span> <span class="s1">'{"ids":["id1", "id2"]}'</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>200</code> if successful</p>
</blockquote>

<p>This endpoint will set all supplied message id&#39;s as read.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-3'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>POST https://api.sello.io/v5/messages/read</code></p>
<h2 id='delete-messages'>Delete messages</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/messages/delete"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'{"ids":["id1", "id2"]}'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>
</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> POST https://api.sello.io/v5/messages/delete <span class="nt">-d</span> <span class="s1">'{"ids":["id1", "id2"]}'</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>200</code> if successful</p>
</blockquote>

<p>This endpoint will delete all supplied message id&#39;s.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-4'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>POST https://api.sello.io/v5/messages/delete</code></p>
<h1 id='orders'>Orders</h1><h2 id='getting-orders'>Getting orders</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/orders"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/orders"</span> <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command returns JSON structured like this:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"meta"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"total"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"orders"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">13901393</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"number"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">865</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"status_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">2591259</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"weight"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">630</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"icons"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="s2">"2"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">],</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"reminder_sent"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">false</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"integration_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"market"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"market_reference"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">""</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"created_at"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2016-12-14T10:41:40+01:00"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"delivered_at"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">null</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"updated_at"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2017-03-10T06:40:40+01:00"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"currency"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"NOK"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"shipping_cost"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">10</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"shipping_option"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">null</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"payment_option"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">null</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"total"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">3071</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"total_eur"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mf">337.81</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"customer_alias"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Nils 2017"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"customer_email"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"nils@sello.io"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"customer_phone"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"+467018388282"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"customer_mobile"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"+467018388282"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"customer_first_name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Nils"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"customer_last_name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Muhrén"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"customer_address"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Kungsgatan 24"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"customer_address_2"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">""</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"customer_zip"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"80292"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"customer_city"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Gävle"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"customer_country_code"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"SE"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"is_deleted"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">false</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"is_active"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"is_paid"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"is_delivered"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">false</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"is_new"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">false</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"notes"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Riktigt bra kund"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"row_count"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">5</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint will retrieve up to 300 orders. The result will contain a limited set of attributes, to get all order information (including order rows), you need to fetch the order object using <code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/{orderId}</code>, see below for more information.</p>
<h3 id='http-request'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/orders</code></p>
<h3 id='data'>Data</h3>
<table><thead>
<tr>
<th>Parameter</th>
<th>Read only</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead><tbody>
<tr>
<td>id</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>Internal order id</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>number</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>Customer order id</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>status_id</td>
<td>no</td>
<td>What status this order has</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>weight</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>Total order weight in grams, calculated based on the purchased product&#39;s weights</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>icons</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>An array of order icons (set by order reminder and order feedback)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>reminder_sent</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>Boolean if reminder has been sent. Set by order reminider</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>integration_id</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>On what integration the order was made</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>market</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>On what market the order was made</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>market_reference</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>The market&#39;s reference (order id) for this order</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>created_at</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>Timestamp when the order was created</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>delivered_at</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>Timestamp when the order was delivered, set when you change the order status to a status that is set up to delivered=true</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>updated_at</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>Timestamp when order was updated, set when an update is made on the order or order rows</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>currency</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>Three char currency code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>shipping_cost</td>
<td>no</td>
<td>Shipping cost in selected currency</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>shipping_option</td>
<td>no</td>
<td>What shipping option has been chosen</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>payment_option</td>
<td>no</td>
<td>What payment option has been chosen</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>total</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>Order total in order currency, calculated on shipping cost + value of order rows</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>total_eur</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>Order total, recalculated in Euro</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>customer_alias</td>
<td>no</td>
<td>Customer&#39;s alias</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>customer_email</td>
<td>no</td>
<td>Customer&#39;s email address</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>customer_phone</td>
<td>no</td>
<td>Customer&#39;s phone number</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>customer_mobile</td>
<td>no</td>
<td>Customer&#39;s mobile phone number</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>customer_first_name</td>
<td>no</td>
