<td>Customer&#39;s first name</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>customer_last_name</td>
<td>no</td>
<td>Customer&#39;s last name</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>customer_address</td>
<td>no</td>
<td>Customer&#39;s address</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>customer_address_2</td>
<td>no</td>
<td>Customer&#39;s address line 2</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>customer_zip</td>
<td>no</td>
<td>Customer&#39;s zip code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>customer_city</td>
<td>no</td>
<td>Customer&#39;s city</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>customer_country_code</td>
<td>no</td>
<td>Customer&#39;s 2-char country code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>is_deleted</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>Boolean if order is deleted (set when changing to an order status with deleted=true)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>is_active</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>Boolean if order is active (set when changing to an order status with active=true)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>is_paid</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>If order is paid (set when changing to an order status with active=true)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>is_delivered</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>Boolean if order is delivered (set when changing to an order status with delivered=true)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>is_new</td>
<td>no</td>
<td>Boolean if the order is new (seen) or not</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>notes</td>
<td>no</td>
<td>A string of order notes</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>row_count</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>Numeric value how many rows this order contains</td>
</tr>
</tbody></table>
<h3 id='pagination'>Pagination</h3>
<p>By default, 10 orders are returned per page. You may changing this by setting <code>size</code> to a value up to 300. To paginate, use <code>offset</code> to fetch orders by a different offset.</p>

<p>Examples:</p>

<p>Fetch orders 0-20:
<code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/orders?size=20&amp;offset=0</code></p>

<p>Fetch orders 20-40:
<code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/orders?size=20&amp;offset=20</code></p>

<p>Fetch orders 40-60:
<code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/orders?size=20&amp;offset=40</code></p>
<h3 id='sorting'>Sorting</h3>
<p>The following fields supports sorting:</p>

<ul>
<li>customer_alias</li>
<li>number</li>
<li>weight</li>
<li>total_eur</li>
<li>created_at</li>
<li>updated_at</li>
<li>delivered_at</li>
<li>row_count</li>
</ul>

<p>To sort, append <code>sort</code> to the url and optional <code>sort_direction</code> (can be either <code>asc</code> or <code>desc</code>):</p>

<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/orders?sort=customer_alias&amp;sort_direction=desc</code></p>
<h3 id='filtering'>Filtering</h3>
<p>The following fields supports filtering:</p>

<ul>
<li>customer_country_code</li>
<li>is_deleted</li>
<li>is_active</li>
<li>is_delivered</li>
<li>is_new</li>
<li>is_paid</li>
<li>status_id</li>
<li>integration_id</li>
</ul>

<p>To filter, add <code>filter[{filter name}]=value</code> to the url. You can add one or many filters at once. For example:</p>

<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/orders?filter[customer_country_code]=NO&amp;filter[status_id]=382</code></p>
<h3 id='searching'>Searching</h3>
<p>To search, add <code>search={query}</code> to the url. For example:</p>

<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/orders?search=stockholm</code></p>
<h3 id='combining'>Combining</h3>
<p>You may combine sorting, filtering and searching at once. For example, to list all orders that are active, in Sweden, search of stockholm and sorted by weight descending:</p>

<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/orders?filter[is_active]=true&amp;filter[customer_country_code]=SE&amp;search=stockholm&amp;sort=weight&amp;sort_direction=desc</code></p>
<h3 id='getting-a-single-order'>Getting a single order</h3>
<p>To fetch all data about an order, you may fetch it by requesting the order id:</p>

<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/{orderId}</code></p>

<p>This will return some addiditional information compared to getting the list of orders:</p>

<table><thead>
<tr>
<th>Parameter</th>
<th>Read only</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead><tbody>
<tr>
<td>rows</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>All order rows for this order</td>
</tr>
</tbody></table>
<h2 id='add-an-order'>Add an order</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/orders"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'{"integration_id":"4", "status_id": "123", "currency": "EUR"}'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> POST <span class="nt">-d</span> <span class="s1">'{"integration_id":"4", "status_id": "123", "currency": "EUR"}'</span> https://api.sello.io/v5/orders
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>201</code> and return the created order id:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">14475806</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint will add an order.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-2'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>POST https://api.sello.io/v5/orders</code></p>
<h3 id='supported-parameters'>Supported parameters</h3>
<table><thead>
<tr>
<th>Parameter</th>
<th>Required?</th>
</tr>
</thead><tbody>
<tr>
<td>customer_first_name</td>
<td>no</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>customer_last_name</td>
<td>no</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>customer_address</td>
<td>no</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>customer_address_2</td>
<td>no</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>customer_zip</td>
<td>no</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>customer_city</td>
<td>no</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>customer_country_code</td>
<td>no</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>customer_alias</td>
<td>no</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>customer_email</td>
<td>no</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>customer_phone</td>
<td>no</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>customer_mobile</td>
<td>no</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>shipping_cost</td>
<td>no</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>notes</td>
<td>no</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>status_id</td>
<td>yes</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>market_reference</td>
<td>no</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>integration_id</td>
<td>yes</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>currency</td>
<td>yes</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>payment_option</td>
<td>no</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>shipping_option</td>
<td>no</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>created_at</td>
<td>no</td>
</tr>
</tbody></table>
<h2 id='copy-an-order'>Copy an order</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">/copy"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> POST https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/<span class="o">{</span><span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">}</span>/copy
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>201</code> and return the created order id:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">14475806</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint will copy an existing order. The resulting new order will be of type &quot;own order&quot; and with <code>integration_id</code> 0. This to indicate that the order isn&#39;t the original market&#39;s order but a copy.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-3'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>POST https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/{id}/copy</code></p>
<h2 id='merge-orders'>Merge orders</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">keepId</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">/merge"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'{"orders": [1, 2, 3]}'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> POST <span class="nt">-d</span> <span class="s1">'{"orders": [1, 2, 3]}'</span> https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/<span class="o">{</span>keepId<span class="o">}</span>/merge
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>200</code> if successful</p>
</blockquote>

<p>Use this endpoint to merge orders. All orders in the array will be merged into order <code>keepId</code>. For example, if you have <code>keepId=123</code> and <code>orders=[123, 567, 987]</code>, then all order rows from order 567 and 987 will be added to 123 and orders 567 and 987 will be removed.</p>

<p>You are not allowed to merge orders with different currencies. If you attempt this, you will get <code>400 Bad Request</code>.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-4'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>POST https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/{keepId}/merge</code></p>
<h2 id='change-an-order'>Change an order</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'PUT'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'{"customer_alias":"New alias"}'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>
</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> PUT https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/<span class="o">{</span><span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">}</span> <span class="nt">-d</span> <span class="s1">'{"customer_alias":"New alias"}'</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>200</code> if successful</p>
</blockquote>

<p>This endpoint will update an order. Only send the attributes you wish to update, the other attributes will remain unchanged.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-5'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>PUT https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/{id}</code></p>
<h3 id='supported-attributes'>Supported attributes</h3>
<p>The following attributes may be updated, any other attributes will be silently ignored and unchanged.</p>

<ul>
<li>status_id</li>
<li>shipping_cost</li>
<li>shipping_option</li>
<li>payment_option</li>
<li>customer_alias</li>
<li>customer_email</li>
<li>customer_phone</li>
<li>customer_mobile</li>
<li>customer_first_name</li>
<li>customer_last_name</li>
<li>customer_address</li>
<li>customer_address_2</li>
<li>customer_zip</li>
<li>customer_city</li>
<li>customer_country_code</li>
<li>is_new</li>
<li>notes</li>
</ul>
<h2 id='change-multiple-orders'>Change multiple orders</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/orders"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'PUT'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'{"orders": [11, 22, 33], "changes": { "customer_alias":"New alias"}}'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>
</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> PUT https://api.sello.io/v5/orders <span class="nt">-d</span> <span class="s1">'{"orders": [11, 22, 33], "changes": { "customer_alias":"New alias"}}'</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>200</code> if successful</p>
</blockquote>

<p>This endpoint will update a list of orders with the <code>changes</code> you supply. Only send the attributes you wish to update, the other attributes will remain unchanged. All changes supported by <code>PUT v5/orders/{id}</code> are supported in this call.</p>
<h2 id='getting-delivery-notes'>Getting delivery notes</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/deliverynotes"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'{"orders": [1, 2, 3]}'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> POST <span class="nt">-d</span> <span class="s1">'{"orders": [1, 2, 3]}'</span> https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/deliverynotes
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>201</code> if successful and a list of document url&#39;s</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="s2">"https://files.sello.io/deliverynotes/42d2fd3b3f08cd4513f0380a2dd70d1fa2abebe1.pdf"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>Generate delivery notes for the supplied order id&#39;s. You will normally receive one pdf file for each integration the orders are attached to. For example, if you supply 7 orders on one integration and 3 orders for another, you will receive 2 file url&#39;s.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-6'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>POST https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/deliverynotes</code></p>
<h2 id='getting-delivery-notes-by-market-order-number'>Getting delivery notes by market order number</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/ref/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">market-order-number</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">/documents"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/ref/<span class="o">{</span>market-order-number<span class="o">}</span>/documents
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>201</code> if successful and a list of document url&#39;s</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="s2">"https://files.sello.io/deliverynotes/42d2fd3b3f08cd4513f0380a2dd70d1fa2abebe1.pdf"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>Generate delivery notes for the supplied market order number.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-7'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/ref/{market-order-number}/documents</code></p>
<h2 id='getting-order-rows'>Getting order rows</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">/rows"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/{id}/rows"</span> <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command returns JSON structured like this:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"8109592"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"quantity"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"title"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"High quality watch"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"reference"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"WTCH_3829"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"price"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"100"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"stock_location"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Shelf 8"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"item_no"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"124"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"tax"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"25.00"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"created_at"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2016-12-14 10:53:09"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"product_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"29372618"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"integration_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"9472"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"identifier"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"51748283"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"identifier_type"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"EAN"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"total_weight"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">282</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"submitter"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"9"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"purchase_price"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"10"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"tradera_order_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">null</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"total_vat"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">440</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint will retrieve an array of all order rows for specified order.</p>
<h3 id='http-request'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/{id}/rows</code></p>
<h3 id='data'>Data</h3>
<table><thead>
<tr>
<th>Parameter</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead><tbody>
<tr>
<td>id</td>
<td>Order row id (read only)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>quantity</td>
<td>How many was purchased</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>title</td>
<td>Row title</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>reference</td>
<td>Your product reference (private SKU)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>price</td>
<td>Price/each in order currency</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>stock_location</td>
<td>Product location (read only), fetched from product object</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>item_no</td>
<td>External item no, for example auction id or webshop product id</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>tax</td>
<td>Tax rate</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>created_at</td>
<td>Timestamp when product was created (read only)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>product_id</td>
<td>Sello product id</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>integration_id</td>
<td>On what integration the order was made</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>identifier</td>
<td>Identifier number (EAN, GTIN, UPC, ISBN)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>identifier_type</td>
<td>Type of identifier</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>total_weight</td>
<td>Total weight (product weight &times; quantity) in grams. Read only, fetched from product</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>submitter</td>
<td>Submitter id (see submitters)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>purchase_price</td>
<td>Total purchase price. Read only, fetched from product</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>tradera_order_id</td>
<td>Tradera&#39;s order id (if any)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>total_vat</td>
<td>Total VAT for this row</td>
</tr>
</tbody></table>
<h2 id='add-an-order-row'>Add an order row</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">/rows"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">json_encode</span><span class="p">(</span>
<span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s2">"quantity"</span> <span class="o">=&gt;</span> <span class="mi">10</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s2">"title"</span> <span class="o">=&gt;</span> <span class="s2">"My order row title"</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s2">"reference"</span> <span class="o">=&gt;</span> <span class="s2">"Product SKU"</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s2">"price"</span> <span class="o">=&gt;</span> <span class="mi">50</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s2">"item_no"</span> <span class="o">=&gt;</span> <span class="s2">"123"</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s2">"tax"</span> <span class="o">=&gt;</span> <span class="mi">25</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s2">"integration_id"</span> <span class="o">=&gt;</span> <span class="mi">4</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s2">"product_id"</span> <span class="o">=&gt;</span> <span class="mi">1893372</span>
<span class="p">]</span>
<span class="p">));</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/{id}/rows"</span> <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> POST <span class="nt">-d</span> <span class="s1">'{"quantity": 10, "title": "My order row title", "reference": "Product SKU", "price": 50, "item_no": "123", "tax": 25, "integration_id": 4, "product_id": 1893372}'</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command returns the added row like this:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"8109592"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"quantity"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"10"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"title"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"My order row title"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"reference"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Product SKU"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"price"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"50"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"stock_location"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Shelf 8"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"item_no"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"123"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"tax"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"25.00"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"created_at"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2016-12-14 10:53:09"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"product_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"1893372"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"integration_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"9472"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"identifier"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"51748283"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"identifier_type"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"EAN"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"total_weight"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">282</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"submitter"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">null</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"purchase_price"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"10"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"tradera_order_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">null</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"total_vat"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">440</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint will add an order row to an existing order.</p>

<p>Required fields are:</p>

<ul>
<li>quantity</li>
<li>title</li>
<li>price</li>
<li>tax</li>
</ul>
<h3 id='http-request-2'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>POST https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/{id}/rows</code></p>
<h2 id='change-an-order-row'>Change an order row</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">id}/rows/{rowId</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'PUT'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'{"title":"New title"}'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>
</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> PUT https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/<span class="o">{</span><span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">}</span>/rows/<span class="o">{</span>rowId<span class="o">}</span> <span class="nt">-d</span> <span class="s1">'{"title":"New title"}'</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will return the updated row:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"8109592"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"quantity"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"title"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"New title"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"reference"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"WTCH_3829"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"price"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"100"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"stock_location"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Shelf 8"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"item_no"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"124"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"tax"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"25.00"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"created_at"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2016-12-14 10:53:09"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"product_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"29372618"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"integration_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"9472"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"identifier"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"51748283"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"identifier_type"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"EAN"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"total_weight"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">282</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"submitter"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"9"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"purchase_price"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"10"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"tradera_order_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">null</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"total_vat"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">440</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint will allow you to update an order row.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-3'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>PUT https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/{id}/rows/{rowId}</code></p>
<h3 id='data-2'>Data</h3>
<p>The following attributes may be updated:</p>

<ul>
<li>quantity</li>
<li>title</li>
<li>reference</li>
<li>price</li>
<li>stock_location</li>
<li>item_no</li>
<li>tax</li>
<li>product_id</li>
</ul>
<h2 id='create-update-order-row-return'>Create/update order row return</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">id}/rows/{rowId</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'PUT'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'{"status":"accepted","status_reason":"Wrong size","status_updated":"2023-02-22T11:00:00Z","quantity_returned":1}'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>
</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> PUT https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/<span class="o">{</span><span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">}</span>/rows/<span class="o">{</span>rowId<span class="o">}</span> <span class="nt">-d</span> <span class="s1">'{"status":"accepted","status_reason":"Wrong size","status_updated":"2023-02-22T11:00:00Z","quantity_returned":1}'</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will return the updated row:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"message"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Return updated"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint allows you to create or update a return on an order row.</p>

<p>To create a return you must first send an initial update with status <code>return_pending</code>, this is to register the initial return in Sello and on marketplaces that support order returns.</p>

<p>After the return is registered in Sello you can update the status with the final status of <code>return_accepted</code> or <code>return_denied</code>, which will then be sent to marketplaces that suport returns.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-4'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>PUT https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/{orderId}/rows/{rowId}/return</code></p>
<h3 id='data-3'>Data</h3>
<table><thead>
<tr>
<th>Parameter</th>
<th>Required</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead><tbody>
<tr>
<td>status</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>Return status (one of: &quot;return_pending&quot;, &quot;return_accepted&quot;, &quot;return_declined&quot;)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>status_reason</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>Reason for return (max 100 characters)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>quantity_returned</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>Returned product quantity</td>
</tr>
</tbody></table>
<h3 id='marketplace-specific-return-reasons'>Marketplace specific return reasons</h3>
<p>On some marketplace, you <strong>MUST</strong> use specific <code>status_reason</code> values, which are listed below.</p>

<table><thead>
<tr>
<th>Marketplace</th>
<th>status_reason value</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead><tbody>
<tr>
<td>Zalando</td>
<td>reason_0</td>
<td>Unknown</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Zalando</td>
<td>reason_1</td>
<td>It doesn&#39;t suit me</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Zalando</td>
<td>reason_2</td>
<td>Too big</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Zalando</td>
<td>reason_3</td>
<td>Too small</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Zalando</td>
<td>reason_4</td>
<td>Insufficient quality</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Zalando</td>
<td>reason_5</td>
<td>Arrived too late</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Zalando</td>
<td>reason_6</td>
<td>Not as expected</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Zalando</td>
<td>reason_9</td>
<td>Incorrect article</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Zalando</td>
<td>reason_10</td>
<td>Faulty</td>
</tr>
</tbody></table>
<h3 id='errors'>Errors</h3>
<table><thead>
<tr>
<th>Status code</th>
<th>Message</th>
<th>Reason</th>
</tr>
</thead><tbody>
<tr>
<td>400</td>
<td>Won&#39;t register return since current status is {current} and want to change to {new}</td>
<td>Not allowed to change return status</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>404</td>
<td>No such order found</td>
<td>Order not found in your Sello account</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>404</td>
<td>No such order row</td>
<td>Order row not found on specified Sello order</td>
</tr>
</tbody></table>
<h2 id='delete-an-order-row'>Delete an order row</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">id}/rows/{rowId</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'DELETE'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>
</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> PUT https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/<span class="o">{</span><span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">}</span>/rows/<span class="o">{</span>rowId<span class="o">}</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> <span class="s1">'DELETE'</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will return status 204</p>
</blockquote>

<p>This endpoint will allow you to remove an order row.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-5'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>DELETE https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/{id}/rows/{rowId}</code></p>
<h2 id='separate-an-order-row'>Separate an order row</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">id}/rows/{rowId</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">/separate"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/{id}/rows/{rowId}/separate"</span> <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> POST <span class="nt">-d</span> <span class="s1">'{"quantity": 10, "title": "My order row title", "reference": "Product SKU", "price": 50, "item_no": "123", "tax": 25, "integration_id": 4, "product_id": 1893372}'</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command returns 201 and the id of the newly created order like this:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"8109592"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint will separate an order row from the current order into a new order.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-6'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>POST https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/{id}/rows/{rowId}/separate</code></p>
<h2 id='get-order-deliveries'>Get order deliveries</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">/deliveries"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/{id}/deliveries"</span> <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command returns JSON structured like this:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"deliveries"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"UA912821763"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"method"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"posten"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"documents"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="s2">"https://documents.sello.io/deliveries/k3294k2194812j2k59c8xt2f1d1648dja.pdf"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"UA836194721"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"method"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"posten"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"documents"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[]</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint will retrieve all available order deliveries for an order. The result will contain tracking id&#39;s and any associated documents.</p>
<h3 id='http-request'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/{id}/deliveries</code></p>
<h2 id='add-order-delivery'>Add order delivery</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/10000015/deliveries"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'{"id":"UU3918661", "method": "posten", "documents": ["https://documents.sello.io/deliveries/k3294k2194812j2k59c8xt2f1d1648dja.pdf"]}'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> POST <span class="nt">-d</span> <span class="s1">'{"id":"UU3918661", "method": "posten", "documents": ["https://documents.sello.io/deliveries/k3294k2194812j2k59c8xt2f1d1648dja.pdf"]}'</span> https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/<span class="o">{</span><span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">}</span>/deliveries
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>201</code> and return the created delivery:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"UU3918661"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"method"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"posten"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"documents"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="s2">"https://documents.sello.io/deliveries/k3294k2194812j2k59c8xt2f1d1648dja.pdf"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint will add an order delivery to the order. The <code>id</code> must be unique. If it already exist on the order, it will be overwritten.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-2'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>POST https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/{id}/deliveries</code></p>
<h3 id='data'>Data</h3>
<table><thead>
<tr>
<th>Parameter</th>
<th>Required?</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead><tbody>
<tr>
<td>id</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>Tracking id for the delivery</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>method</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>Valid values are any of: dhl, bring, bussgods, posten, posti, schenker, gls, skynet, ups, dpd, dsv, tnt, fedex, itella, postenaland, other</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>documents</td>
<td>no</td>
<td>An array of links to documents associated with this delivery</td>
</tr>
</tbody></table>
<h2 id='remove-an-order-delivery'>Remove an order delivery</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">orderId}/deliveries/{id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'DELETE'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>
</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> DELETE https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/<span class="o">{</span>orderId<span class="o">}</span>/deliveries/<span class="o">{</span><span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">}</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>204</code> if successful</p>
</blockquote>

<p>This endpoint will remove an order delivery from the order. Please note that if the order has been set as delivered and thereby the delivery id&#39;s have been synced to marketplaces, then removing the id&#39;s won&#39;t remove them from the marketplaces.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-3'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>DELETE https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/{orderId}/deliveries/{id}</code></p>
<h3 id='data-2'>Data</h3>
<table><thead>
<tr>
<th>Parameter</th>
<th>Required?</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead><tbody>
<tr>
<td>id</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>Tracking id for the delivery</td>
</tr>
</tbody></table>
<h2 id='get-order-history'>Get order history</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">/history"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>
</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/{id}/history"</span> <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command returns JSON structured like this:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"history"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"time"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2016-12-09T09:21:07+00:00"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"message"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"History message 12"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"time"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2016-12-09T09:21:06+00:00"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"message"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"History message 11"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"time"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2016-12-09T09:21:04+00:00"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"message"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"History message 10"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"time"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2016-12-09T09:21:03+00:00"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"message"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"History message 9"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"time"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2016-12-09T09:21:01+00:00"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"message"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"History message 8"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"time"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2016-12-09T09:20:59+00:00"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"message"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"History message 7"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"time"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2016-12-09T09:20:56+00:00"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"message"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"History message 6"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"time"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2016-12-09T09:20:55+00:00"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
