</span><span class="nl">"message"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"History message 5"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"time"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2016-12-09T09:20:54+00:00"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"message"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"History message 4"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"time"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2016-12-09T09:20:52+00:00"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"message"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"History message 3"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">],</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"next"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"1481275252670"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint will retrieve 10 order history items with timestamp and message. If there is more than 10 history items on an order, you will also retrieve a value for <code>next</code>. To fetch more messages, you use this value to fetch an addidional 10 items.</p>

<p>The timestamps returned are UTC.</p>
<h3 id='http-request'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/{id}/history</code></p>
<h3 id='query-parameters'>Query Parameters</h3>
<table><thead>
<tr>
<th>Parameter</th>
<th>Default</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead><tbody>
<tr>
<td>next</td>
<td>empty</td>
<td>Leave empty to fetch the 10 latest items, or use a token for a previous request to fetch an additional 10 items.</td>
</tr>
</tbody></table>
<h2 id='make-receipts'>Make receipts</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/receipts"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'{"orders":[123, 456, 789]}'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> POST <span class="nt">-d</span> <span class="s1">'{"orders":[123, 456, 789]}'</span> https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/receipts
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>201</code> and return the created pdf file:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"url"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="s2">"https://documents.sello.io/receipts/k3294k2194812j2k59c8xt2f1d1648dja.pdf"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint will generate receipts for all supplied orders and return an url to the PDF receipt.</p>
<h3 id='http-request'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>POST https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/receipts</code></p>
<h2 id='make-trading-documents'>Make Trading documents</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/tradingdocs"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'{"orders":[123, 456, 789]}'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> POST <span class="nt">-d</span> <span class="s1">'{"orders":[123, 456, 789]}'</span> https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/tradingdocs
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>201</code> and return the created pdf file:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"url"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="s2">"https://documents.sello.io/tradingdocs/k3294k2194812j2k59c8xt2f1d1648dja.pdf"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint will generate docs for all supplied orders and return an url to the PDF document.</p>
<h3 id='http-request'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>POST https://api.sello.io/v5/orders/tradingdocs</code></p>
<h1 id='products'>Products</h1><h2 id='getting-products'>Getting products</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/products"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/products"</span> <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command returns JSON structured like this:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"statusCode"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">200</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"data"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"meta"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"total"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"products"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">3635056</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"folder_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">1032767</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"folder_name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Parfym för henne"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"brand_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"434"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"brand_name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Versace"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"condition"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"new"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"tax"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"25"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"group_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">2224433</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"private_name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Versace Bright Crystal Edt 50ml"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"private_reference"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"PVE002"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"quantity"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">10</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"stock_location"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"PVE002"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"created_at"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2014-12-03T00:00:00.000Z"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"updated_at"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">null</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"volume"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"volume_unit"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"m3"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"weight"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">250</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"purchase_price"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">391</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"notes"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">""</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"sold"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">108</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"unsold"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"last_sold"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2017-08-07T00:00:00.000Z"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"shipping"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"10108"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"posten"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"0.00"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"dhl"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">null</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"bussgods"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">null</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"schenker"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">null</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"other"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">null</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">

</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">

</span><span class="nl">"SE"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"H"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"DK"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"B"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">

</span><span class="nl">"campaign"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">null</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"32778"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"sv"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"store"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">null</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"campaign"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">null</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"32978"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">

</span><span class="nl">"37410"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"active"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">false</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"item_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"37411"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"active"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">false</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"item_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"37412"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"active"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">false</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"item_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"37413"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"active"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">false</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"item_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"37937"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"active"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">false</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"item_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"37938"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"active"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">false</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"item_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"37939"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"active"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">false</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"item_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"38071"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"active"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"item_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">384</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"properties"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"property"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"EAN"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"value"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"default"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"8011003993819"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">],</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"auctions"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"10108"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"auctions"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">"121429449"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"83719402"</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"images"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">27507965</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"url_large"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"https://images.sello.io/item/98/50258-original.jpg"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"url_small"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"https://images.sello.io/item/98/50258-shop.jpg"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">],</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"groups"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">123</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"products"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">2</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">3</span><span class="p">],</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"main_product"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">3</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint will retrieve up to 100 products. The result will contain a limited set of attributes, to get all product information, you need to fetch the product object using <code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/products/{productId}</code> or <code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/products/sku/{sku}</code>, see below for more information.</p>

<p>Additionally, a <code>groups</code> array is included in the response. If any product in the result is placed in a group with more than 1 product, that group will be specified with a list of products and what product is tha main product in the group.</p>
<h3 id='http-request'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/products</code> to fetch multiple products</p>

<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/products/{id}</code> to fetch single product by id</p>

<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/products/sku/{sku}</code> to fetch single product by SKU</p>
<h3 id='data'>Data</h3>
<table><thead>
<tr>
<th>Parameter</th>
<th>Read only</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead><tbody>
<tr>
<td>id</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>Internal product id</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>folder_id</td>
<td>no</td>
<td>In what folder this product is placed</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>folder_name</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>The name of the selected folder (based on folder_id)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>brand_id</td>
<td>no</td>
<td>Product&#39;s brand id</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>brand_name</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>The name of the selected brand (based on brand_id)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>condition</td>
<td>no</td>
<td>Must be either new or used</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>tax</td>
<td>no</td>
<td>valid values are 0, 6, 12, 25</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>group_id</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>What group the product belongs to</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>private_name</td>
<td>no</td>
<td>Your own internal product name (not exposed to customer)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>private_reference</td>
<td>no</td>
<td>Your product SKU or reference</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>quantity</td>
<td>no</td>
<td>How many you have in stock of this product</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>stock_location</td>
<td>no</td>
<td>The location where these items are located</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>created_at</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>When the product was created</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>updated_at</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>When the product was last updated</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>volume</td>
<td>no</td>
<td>Product volume</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>volume_unit</td>
<td>no</td>
<td>Unit for volume</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>weight</td>
<td>no</td>
<td>Weight in gram</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>purchase_price</td>
<td>no</td>
<td>Your purchase price, this will be used to generate stats (earnings etc.)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>notes</td>
<td>no</td>
<td>Misc product notes</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>sold</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>How many have been sold of this item</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>unsold</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>How many time you have had an auction unsold on this item (only applies to Tradera)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>last_sold</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>When the product was last sold</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>shipping</td>
<td>no</td>
<td>An object with integration id&#39;s as key, and object representing shipping cost for that integration</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>prices</td>
<td>no</td>
<td>An object with integration id&#39;s as key, and object representing product price on that integration</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>prices.default</td>
<td>no</td>
<td>The default price for this product. By setting calculate=true, the price set as target_price will be converted to repective integration&#39;s currency and override any per-integration prices. &quot;adjust&quot; is an experimental feature and not currently recommended for public use.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>texts</td>
<td>no</td>
<td>See separate section below about the texts object. When listing products, only <code>name</code> for each language will be available. To get the complete text object, please fetch the full product data.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>categories</td>
<td>no</td>
<td>An object with integration id&#39;s as key and an array of category id&#39;s for that integration. Please note that currently only Woocommerce, Prestashop and SelloShop support multiple category id&#39;s.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>categories.defaultl</td>
<td>no</td>
<td>The default Sello category id. This will be used to try to map a marketplace category to your product.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>integrations</td>
<td>no</td>
<td>An object with integration id&#39;s as key and object with two values; active true/false - if the product should be for sale on this channel or not. item_id (read only) - marketplace product identifier.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>properties</td>
<td>no</td>
<td>An array of product properties and their values. See &quot;Get available product properties&quot; section. The value is an object with language code as key for localized values. You are also encouraged to supply &quot;default&quot; as the default value that will be used if a localized value isn&#39;t present for a specific language. In product list, only EAN, GTIN, UPC and ISBN are available - to get all properties you need to fetch the full product data.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>auctions</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>An object with integration id as key. The auctions array contains active auction id&#39;s for that integration.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>images</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>An array with image objects. See section below about adding</td>
</tr>
</tbody></table>
<h3 id='texts'>Texts</h3>
<blockquote>
<p>Example texts object</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"texts"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"default"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"en"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Product name"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"description"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"&lt;p&gt;My product name&lt;/p&gt;"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"title"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">""</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"meta_description"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">""</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"meta_keywords"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">""</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"bulletpoints"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">"Great price"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Fast delivery"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"24k Gold"</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"sv"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"use"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"en"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"no"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"use"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"sv"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"36526"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"no"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"My norwegian name"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"description"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"My Norwegian description, this will only be used for integration 36526"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"title"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"My title"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"meta_description"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"My meta description"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"meta_keywords"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"My meta keywords"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"bulletpoints"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">"Bullet 1"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Bullet 2"</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>Texts have two parts; default texts and integration-specific texts. If no specific text exists for an integration, the default text for the integration&#39;s language will be used.</p>

<p>You specify default texts for each language you want to support. It&#39;s highly recommended to supply an english text since it will be our primary fallback if a default text in a specific language doesn&#39;t exist.
You can either specify <code>use</code> to tell us to use another default text for that language, or specify the actual text details.</p>
<h3 id='pagination'>Pagination</h3>
<p>By default, 100 products are returned per page. You may lowering this by setting <code>size</code> to a value up to 100. Values above 100 will automatically be reset to 100. To paginate, use <code>offset</code> to fetch products by a different offset.</p>

<p>Examples:</p>

<p>Fetch products 0-20:
<code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/products?size=20&amp;offset=0</code></p>

<p>Fetch products 20-40:
<code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/products?size=20&amp;offset=20</code></p>

<p>Fetch products 40-60:
<code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/products?size=20&amp;offset=40</code></p>
<h3 id='sorting'>Sorting</h3>
<p>The following expressions are valid values for sorting. Curly braces means that you should replace this with your language/integration id etc.</p>

<ul>
<li>texts.default.{language}.name</li>
<li>categories.{integrationId}.name</li>
<li>shipping.{integrationId}.{method}</li>
<li>prices.{integrationId}.{type} (type can be store, regular, campaign, auction.start, auction.buynow, auction.reserve)</li>
<li>folder_name</li>
<li>brand_name</li>
<li>condition</li>
<li>tax</li>
<li>group_id</li>
<li>private_name</li>
<li>private_reference</li>
<li>quantity</li>
<li>stock_location</li>
<li>created_at</li>
<li>updated_at</li>
<li>volume</li>
<li>volume_unit</li>
<li>weight</li>
<li>purchase_price</li>
<li>notes</li>
<li>sold</li>
<li>unsold</li>
<li>last_sold</li>
</ul>

<p>To sort, append <code>sort</code> to the url and optional <code>sort_direction</code> (<code>desc</code> by default. Can be either <code>asc</code> or <code>desc</code>):</p>

<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/products?sort=prices.4.store&amp;sort_direction=asc</code></p>
<h3 id='filtering'>Filtering</h3>
<p>The following fields supports filtering:</p>

<ul>
<li>integrations.{integrationId}.active</li>
<li>folder_id</li>
<li>private_reference</li>
<li>quantity</li>
<li>private_name</li>
<li>last_sold</li>
<li>prices.default.calculate</li>
<li>prices.default.adjust</li>
</ul>

<p>To filter, add <code>filter[{filter name}]=value</code> to the url. You can add one or many filters at once.</p>

<p>Quantity and last_sold also support ranges. This means you can use gt (greater than) and lt (less than) to improve filtering. For example, to filter products with less than 10 in quantity you do <code>filter[quantity]=lt 10</code>. To filter products that have been sold after 2017-01-01, you do <code>filter[last_sold]=gt 2017-01-01</code>.</p>

<p>For example filtering by quantity more than 20 and folder_id 0:</p>

<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/products?filter[quantity]=gt 20&amp;filter[folder_id]=0</code></p>

<p><strong>Filtering by multiple values</strong></p>

<p>You may filter by multipe values - ie find products with a list of references by supplying an array of values:</p>

<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/products?filter[id][]=1&amp;filter[id][]=2&amp;filter[id][]=3</code></p>
<h3 id='searching'>Searching</h3>
<p>To search, add <code>search={query}</code> to the url. For example:</p>

<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/products?search=stockholm</code></p>
<h3 id='combining'>Combining</h3>
<p>You may combine sorting, filtering and searching at once. For example, to list all products that are active on integration 4, in folder 0, search of Pokemon and sorted by weight descending:</p>

<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/products?filter[integrations.4.active]=true&amp;filter[folder_id]=0&amp;search=Pokemon&amp;sort=weight&amp;sort_direction=desc</code></p>
<h3 id='getting-a-single-product'>Getting a single product</h3>
<p>To fetch all data about a product, you may fetch it by requesting the product id:</p>

<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/products/{productId}</code></p>

<p>This will return some addiditional information compared to getting the list of products:</p>

<table><thead>
<tr>
<th>Parameter</th>
<th>Read only</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead><tbody>
<tr>
<td>tax_class</td>
<td>No</td>
<td>This is an upcoming feature. Will be documented as soon as it&#39;s generally available</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>quantity_threshold</td>
<td>No</td>
<td>At what quantity we should send mail about quantity being low on product</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>manufacturer</td>
<td>No</td>
<td>Manufacturer id</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>manufacturer_no</td>
<td>No</td>
<td>Manufacturer number</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>submitter_id</td>
<td>No</td>
<td>The id of the submitter that submitted this product (only available for Sales Agents)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>texts</td>
<td>No</td>
<td>This will include the complete texts object and settings for each integration. See separate section in text object above.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>prices</td>
<td>No</td>
<td>Price objects will include <code>currency</code> where available</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>delivery_times</td>
<td>No</td>
<td>An object with region and it&#39;s min/max delivery time. Currently only <code>default</code> is supported, further support will be announced soon.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>categories</td>
<td>No</td>
<td>Categories will additionally include name, crumb and crumb_array - all of these attributes are read-only.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>integrations</td>
<td>No</td>
<td>Each integration will include an <code>extra</code> attribute. This is currently only for internal use.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>properties</td>
<td>No</td>
<td>All properties will be returned. In product list, only EAN, GTIN, UPC and ISBN are available.</td>
</tr>
</tbody></table>

<p>There are also a few fields that aren&#39;t available when you fetch a single product but is in product list:</p>

<ul>
<li>folder_name</li>
<li>brand_name</li>
<li>auctions</li>
</ul>
<h2 id='add-a-product'>Add a product</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/products"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'{"private_reference":"REF-3", "folder_id": "123"}'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> POST <span class="nt">-d</span> <span class="s1">'{"private_reference":"REF-3", "folder_id": "123"}'</span> https://api.sello.io/v5/products
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>201</code> and return the created product data:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">14475806</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"private_reference"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"REF-3"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="err">...</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint will add a product.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-2'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>POST https://api.sello.io/v5/products</code></p>
<h3 id='supported-parameters'>Supported parameters</h3>
<p>All attributes available when you GET a product is also supported when you create a new product.</p>
<h2 id='copy-a-product'>Copy a product</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/products/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">/copy"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> POST https://api.sello.io/v5/products/<span class="o">{</span><span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">}</span>/copy
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>201</code> and return the created product data:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">14475806</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"private_name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Pokemon Cards"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="err">...</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint will copy an existing product.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-3'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>POST https://api.sello.io/v5/products/{id}/copy</code></p>
<h2 id='change-a-product'>Change a product</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/products/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'PUT'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'{"private_name":"New private name"}'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>
</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> PUT https://api.sello.io/v5/products/<span class="o">{</span><span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">}</span> <span class="nt">-d</span> <span class="s1">'{"private_name":"New private name"}'</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>200</code> if successful</p>
</blockquote>

<p>This endpoint will update a product. Only send the attributes you wish to update, the other attributes will remain unchanged. When updated, product will be queued for syncing changes to all activated marketplaces.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-4'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>PUT https://api.sello.io/v5/products/{id}</code> or <code>PUT https://api.sello.io/v5/products/sku/{sku}</code></p>
<h2 id='delete-a-product'>Delete a product</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/products/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'DELETE'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>
</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> DELETE https://api.sello.io/v5/products/<span class="o">{</span><span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">}</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>202</code> if successful</p>
</blockquote>

<p>This endpoint will add a product to queue for deletion. When processed, the product will be permanently removed from Sello and all enabled marketplaces. It is not possible to recover a deleted product.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-5'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>DELETE https://api.sello.io/v5/products/{id}</code> or <code>DELETE https://api.sello.io/v5/products/sku/{sku}</code></p>
<h2 id='add-images'>Add images</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/products/1234/images"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'{"urls":["https://i.vimeocdn.com/portrait/58832_300x300"]}'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> POST <span class="nt">-d</span> <span class="s1">'{"urls":["https://i.vimeocdn.com/portrait/58832_300x300"]}'</span> https://api.sello.io/v5/products/1234/images
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>201</code> and return the updated product data</p>
</blockquote>

<p>This endpoint will add images to a product.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-6'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>POST https://api.sello.io/v5/products/{id}/images</code></p>
<h3 id='supported-parameters-2'>Supported parameters</h3>
<p><code>urls</code>: A list of image URL&#39;s. The first image in the array will be used as the main image for the product if no other images on the product exists. The images you supply will replace any current images on the product.</p>

<p>To prevent duplicates, Sello will check your image URL&#39;s and make sure that they don&#39;t already exist on the product. If they do, we&#39;ll return the data for that image.</p>
<h2 id='delete-an-image'>Delete an image</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/products/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">id}/images/{imageId</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'DELETE'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>
</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> DELETE https://api.sello.io/v5/products/<span class="o">{</span><span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">}</span>/images/<span class="o">{</span>imageId<span class="o">}</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>200</code> if successful</p>
</blockquote>

<p>This endpoint will permanently remove a product image. When processed, the image will be permanently removed from Sello and all enabled marketplaces. It is not possible to recover a deleted image.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-7'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>DELETE https://api.sello.io/v5/products/{id}/images/{imageId}</code></p>
<h2 id='change-cover-image'>Change cover image</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/products/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">id}/images/{imageId</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">/cover"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> POST https://api.sello.io/v5/products/<span class="o">{</span><span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">}</span>/images/<span class="o">{</span>imageId<span class="o">}</span>/cover
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>200</code> upon success</p>
</blockquote>

<p>This endpoint will set the supplied image id as cover image of the product.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-8'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>POST https://api.sello.io/v5/products/{id}/images/{imageId}/cover</code></p>
<h2 id='bulk-editing-products'>Bulk-editing products</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/products/bulk"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'PUT'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'{"products":["31662149","31662150"],"data":{"texts":{"99":{"sv":{"name":"New product name"}}}}}'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> PUT <span class="nt">-d</span> <span class="s1">'{"products":["31662149","31662150"],"data":{"texts":{"99":{"sv":{"name":"New product name"}}}}}'</span> https://api.sello.io/v5/products/bulk
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>202</code> and process your request in queue</p>
</blockquote>

<p>This endpoint is used to update multiple products (up to 100) with the same information. For example, if you want to set the same name or properties on multiple products, this is the endpoint for you.</p>
<h3 id='http-request'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>PUT https://api.sello.io/v5/products/bulk</code></p>
<h3 id='data'>Data</h3>
<table><thead>
<tr>
<th>Parameter</th>
<th>Required?</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead><tbody>
<tr>
<td>products</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>An array of product id&#39;s to update</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>data</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>The new product data. This uses the same format as when you GET a product. Please only send the data you want to change and not the complete product object.</td>
</tr>
</tbody></table>
<h2 id='get-product-history'>Get product history</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/products/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">/history"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>
</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/products/{id}/history"</span> <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command returns JSON structured like this:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"history"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"time"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2017-02-24T11:57:00+00:00"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"message"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Generic message"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"code"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"123"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"params"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"foo"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"bar"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"time"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2017-02-24T11:56:57+00:00"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"message"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Generic message"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"code"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"456"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"params"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"foo"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"bar"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">],</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"next"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"1481275252670"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint will retrieve 20 product history items with timestamp, history code, params and message. If there is more than 20 history items on a product, you will also retrieve a value for <code>next</code>. To fetch more messages, you use this value to fetch an addidional 20 items.</p>

<p>The timestamps returned are UTC.</p>
<h3 id='http-request'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/products/{id}/history</code></p>
<h3 id='query-parameters'>Query Parameters</h3>
<table><thead>
<tr>
<th>Parameter</th>
<th>Default</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead><tbody>
<tr>
<td>next</td>
<td>empty</td>
<td>Leave empty to fetch the 20 latest items, or use a token for a previous request to fetch an additional 20 items.</td>
</tr>
</tbody></table>
<h3 id='supported-history-codes'>Supported history codes</h3>
<table><thead>
<tr>
<th>Code</th>
<th>Params</th>
<th>Message</th>
</tr>
</thead><tbody>
<tr>
<td>0</td>
<td>-</td>
<td><em>The item has no code or params. Legacy history item, just show the message</em></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>101</td>
<td>{&quot;quantity&quot;: 20}</td>
<td>Updating product quantity to 20</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>102</td>
<td>{&quot;auction&quot;: 123}</td>
<td>Closing auction 123 on Tradera</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>103</td>
<td>{&quot;auction&quot;: 123}</td>
<td>Created auction 123 on Tradera</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>104</td>
<td>{&quot;id&quot;: 123}</td>
<td>Created store item 123 on Tradera</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>105</td>
<td>{&quot;auction&quot;: 123}</td>
<td>Auction 123 was unsold on Tradera. Increasing stock.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>106</td>
<td>{&quot;quantity&quot;: 4}</td>
<td>4 items sold in Selloshop</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>107</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>Could not create auction on Tradera</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>108</td>
<td>{&quot;date&quot;: &quot;2017-02-24T15:12:13+01:00&quot;}</td>
<td>Adding auction to be created at 2017-02-24T15:12:13+01:00</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>109</td>
<td>{&quot;id&quot;: 4}</td>
<td>Added to Prestashop, got id: 4</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>110</td>
<td>{&quot;quantity&quot;: 4}</td>
<td>4 items sold in Woocommerce</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>111</td>
<td>{&quot;quantity&quot;: 4, &quot;id&quot;: 123}</td>
<td>4 items sold on Tradera order 123</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>112</td>
<td>{&quot;quantity&quot;: 4, &quot;id&quot;: 123}</td>
<td>4 items sold on Prestashop order 123</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>113</td>
<td>{&quot;quantity&quot;: 4, &quot;id&quot;: 123}</td>
<td>4 items sold on Fyndiq order 123</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>114</td>
<td>{&quot;quantity&quot;: 4, &quot;id&quot;: 123}</td>
<td>4 items sold on CDON order 123</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>115</td>
<td>{&quot;quantity&quot;: 4, &quot;id&quot;: 123}</td>
<td>4 items sold on Amazon33650556 order 123</td>
</tr>
</tbody></table>
<h2 id='get-available-product-properties'>Get available product properties</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/products/properties"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/products/properties"</span> <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command returns JSON structured like this:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"MaximumManufacturerWeightRecommended"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Maximum manufacturer weight recommended"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"type"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"text"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"MaximumManufacturerAgeRecommended"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Maximum manufacturer age recommended"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"type"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"text"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"MinimumWeightRecommendation"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Minimum weight recommendation"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"type"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"text"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"CountryAsLabeled"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Country as labeled"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"type"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"text"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Battery"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Battery"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"type"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"text"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
