<p>This endpoint will retrieve up to 10 properties. Use <code>offset</code> to paginate.</p>
<h3 id='http-request'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/products/properties</code></p>
<h3 id='data'>Data</h3>
<table><thead>
<tr>
<th>Parameter</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead><tbody>
<tr>
<td>id</td>
<td>Property id, to be submitted to product resource</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>name</td>
<td>Friendly translated property name (use <code>Accept-language</code> to determine language)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>type</td>
<td>either <code>text</code> = Any text input is valid or <code>enum</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>values</td>
<td>only available if type is <code>enum</code>. You must specify any of the specified values when you save your product.</td>
</tr>
</tbody></table>
<h3 id='pagination'>Pagination</h3>
<p>By default, 10 properties are returned per page. You may changing this by setting <code>size</code> to a value up to 100. To paginate, use <code>offset</code> to fetch properties by a different offset.</p>

<p>Examples:</p>

<p>Fetch properties 0-20:
<code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/products/properties?size=20&amp;offset=0</code></p>

<p>Fetch properties 20-40:
<code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/products/properties?size=20&amp;offset=20</code></p>

<p>Fetch properties 40-60:
<code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/products/properties?size=20&amp;offset=40</code></p>
<h3 id='getting-specific-properties'>Getting specific properties</h3>
<p>You may choose to filter by specific property names by adding a comma-separated list of property name. For example, if you are only interested in Color and Material properties, you could do a query like:</p>

<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/products/properties?filter[id]=Color,Material</code></p>
<h3 id='searching'>Searching</h3>
<p>To search, add <code>search={query}</code> to the url. For example:</p>

<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/products/properties?search=shape</code></p>
<h2 id='get-required-and-recommended-properties-for-a-certain-category'>Get required and recommended properties for a certain category</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/products/properties/required"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">json_encode</span><span class="p">([</span><span class="s1">'categories'</span> <span class="o">=&gt;</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="s1">'4'</span> <span class="o">=&gt;</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="s1">'1'</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'2'</span><span class="p">]]]));</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>Example payload:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"categories"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"4"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"344361"</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">],</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"32185"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2920"</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">],</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"33063"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">null</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">],</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"36363"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"3237"</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">],</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"37199"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"8787"</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">],</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"37716"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2070"</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> POST <span class="nt">-d</span> <span class="s1">'{"categories":{"4": ["1", "2"]}}'</span> https://api.sello.io/v5/products/properties/required
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command returns JSON structured like this:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"required"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">"Color"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Material"</span><span class="p">],</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"recommended"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">"ColorPattern"</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint will an array of required respective recommended properties for the specified categories.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-2'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>POST https://api.sello.io/v5/products/properties/required</code></p>
<h3 id='data-2'>Data</h3>
<p>The payload should be specified as an object with integration id&#39;s as the key and an array of category id&#39;s as the value. In the example payload, integration id 4 has one category specified - 344361.</p>
<h2 id='create-stock-value-document'>Create stock value document</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/products/value"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> POST https://api.sello.io/v5/products/value
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>201</code> and return the created order id:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"url"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"https://files.sello.io/438jd0d9dh2ksd09f.xlsx"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint will generate stock value document in xlsx format.</p>
<h1 id='product-map-api'>Product map API</h1>
<p>This API is designed to simplify the integration of product data. Simply PUT your product data in JSON format, and we’ll handle the mapping on our end. This enterprise feature requires a separate agreement. <a href="https://www.sello.io/en/contact/">Please contact Sales for more information</a>.</p>
<h2 id='submit-product-data'>Submit product data</h2>
<p>Use this endpoint to submit your product data in JSON format, following the schema agreed upon with your Onboarding Agent. Once data is submitted to the endpoint, your request will be queued and processed later. Please ensure you only use this endpoint when there are actual changes to your product data.</p>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/products/mapped/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">integrationId}/{parentSku}/{sku</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">/update"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_PUT</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'{"name":"Cool t-shirt", "size": "XXL"}'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> PUT <span class="nt">-d</span> <span class="s1">'{"name":"Cool t-shirt", "size": "XXL"}'</span> https://api.sello.io/v5/products/mapped/<span class="o">{</span>integrationId<span class="o">}</span>/<span class="o">{</span>parentSku<span class="o">}</span>/<span class="o">{</span>sku<span class="o">}</span>/update
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>202</code>.</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"shipping_tax"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"25"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"mail_send_copy"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"1"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div><h3 id='http-request'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>PUT https://api.sello.io/v5/products/mapped/{integrationId}/{parentSku}/{sku}/update</code></p>

<table><thead>
<tr>
<th>Parameter</th>
<th>Max length</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead><tbody>
<tr>
<td>integrationId</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>Internal integration id. This will be provided by your Onboarding Agent</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>parentSku</td>
<td>40</td>
<td>The SKU grouping multiple SKU&#39;s. Se example below</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>sku</td>
<td>40</td>
<td>The SKU of the size/color/model. <strong>IMPORTANT: This must be unique across all your products</strong>. See example below</td>
</tr>
</tbody></table>
<h4 id='example'>Example</h4>
<p>For a t-shirt (sku TS001-red) there are 3 sizes:</p>

<ul>
<li>S: TS001S</li>
<li>M: TS001M</li>
<li>L: TS001L</li>
</ul>

<p>To send data for size M you would set <code>parentSku = TS001-red</code> and <code>sku = TS001M</code></p>
<h1 id='purchase-orders'>Purchase orders</h1><h2 id='getting-purchase-orders'>Getting purchase orders</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/purchaseorders"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/purchaseorders"</span> <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command returns JSON structured like this:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"meta"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"total"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">3</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"orders"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"created_at"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2018-08-29T12:10:00.000Z"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"supplier_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">3468</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"customer_order_number"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">3</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"state"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"open"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"currency"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"EUR"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"total"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">98</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"supplier_name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Shoe Supplier Inc"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"notes"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">null</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"created_at"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2018-08-29T12:01:10.000Z"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"supplier_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">3468</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"customer_order_number"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">2</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"state"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"open"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"currency"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"EUR"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"total"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mf">41.4</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"supplier_name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Shoe Supplier Inc"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"notes"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">null</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint will retrieve your purchase orders.</p>
<h3 id='http-request'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/purchaseorders</code></p>
<h3 id='data'>Data</h3>
<table><thead>
<tr>
<th>Parameter</th>
<th>Read only</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead><tbody>
<tr>
<td>id</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>Internal purchase order id</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>number</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>Merchant order id</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>created_at</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>When the order was created</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>supplier_id</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>The supplier id of this order</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>state</td>
<td>no</td>
<td>Valid values are: open, pending, received</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>supplier_name</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>The supplier&#39;s name (based on the supplier_id)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>total</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>Order total</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>currency</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>Based on the supplier&#39;s currency</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>notes</td>
<td>no</td>
<td>Merchant&#39;s notes on the order (max 255 chars)</td>
</tr>
</tbody></table>
<h3 id='filtering'>Filtering</h3>
<p>The following fields supports filtering:</p>

<ul>
<li>state</li>
<li>id</li>
</ul>

<p>To filter, add <code>filter[{filter name}]=value</code> to the url. You can add one or many filters at once. For example:</p>

<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/purchaseorders?filter[state]=open</code></p>
<h3 id='searching'>Searching</h3>
<p>To search, add <code>search={query}</code> to the url. For example:</p>

<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/purchaseorders?search=shoe</code></p>
<h2 id='add-a-purchase-order'>Add a purchase order</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/purchaseorders"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'{"supplier_id":"3468"}'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> POST <span class="nt">-d</span> <span class="s1">'{"supplier_id":"3468"}'</span> https://api.sello.io/v5/purchaseorders
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>201</code> and return the created order:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">79</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"created_at"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2018-08-29T13:20:32.000Z"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"supplier_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">3468</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"number"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">10</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"state"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"open"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"currency"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"EUR"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"total"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"supplier_name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Shoe Supplier Inc"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"notes"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">null</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint will add an order.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-2'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>POST https://api.sello.io/v5/purchaseorders</code></p>
<h3 id='supported-parameters'>Supported parameters</h3>
<table><thead>
<tr>
<th>Parameter</th>
<th>Required?</th>
</tr>
</thead><tbody>
<tr>
<td>supplier_id</td>
<td>yes</td>
</tr>
</tbody></table>
<h2 id='copy-a-purchase-order'>Copy a purchase order</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/purchaseorders/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">/copy"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> POST https://api.sello.io/v5/purchaseorders/<span class="o">{</span><span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">}</span>/copy
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>201</code> and return the created order:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">79</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"created_at"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"2018-08-29T13:20:32.000Z"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"supplier_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">3468</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"number"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">10</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"state"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"open"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"currency"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"EUR"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"total"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"supplier_name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Shoe Supplier Inc"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"notes"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">null</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint will copy an order.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-3'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>POST https://api.sello.io/v5/purchaseorders/{id}/copy</code></p>
<h2 id='change-a-purchase-order'>Change a purchase order</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/purchaseorders/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'PUT'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'{"state":"pending"}'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>
</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> PUT https://api.sello.io/v5/purchaseorders/<span class="o">{</span><span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">}</span> <span class="nt">-d</span> <span class="s1">'{"state":"pending"}'</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>200</code> if successful</p>
</blockquote>

<p>This endpoint will update a purchaseorder. Only send the attributes you wish to update, the other attributes will remain unchanged.
When an order has state &quot;received&quot;, you are not allowed to change it to another state.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-4'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>PUT https://api.sello.io/v5/purchaseorders/{id}</code></p>
<h3 id='supported-attributes'>Supported attributes</h3>
<p>The following attributes may be updated, any other attributes will be silently ignored and unchanged.</p>

<ul>
<li>state</li>
<li>notes</li>
<li>supplier_id</li>
</ul>
<h2 id='delete-a-purchase-order'>Delete a purchase order</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/purchaseorders/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">orderId</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'DELETE'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>
</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> DELETE https://api.sello.io/v5/purchaseorders/<span class="o">{</span>orderId<span class="o">}</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>200</code> if successful</p>
</blockquote>

<p>This endpoint will delete an order. You are not allowed to delete orders that have &quot;received&quot; state.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-5'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>DELETE https://api.sello.io/v5/purchaseorders/{orderId}</code></p>
<h2 id='getting-purchase-order-rows'>Getting purchase order rows</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/purchaseorders/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">/rows"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/purchaseorders/{id}/rows"</span> <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command returns JSON structured like this:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">13196</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"product_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">39407525</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"quantity"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">10</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"price_each"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mf">3.1</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"My test product 1"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"sku"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"TEST1"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">13197</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"product_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">38504479</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"quantity"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">5</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"price_each"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mf">0.14</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"My test product 2"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"sku"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"TEST2"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint will retrieve an array of all order rows for specified order.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-6'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/purchaseorders/{id}/rows</code></p>
<h3 id='data-2'>Data</h3>
<table><thead>
<tr>
<th>Parameter</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead><tbody>
<tr>
<td>id</td>
<td>Order row id (read only)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>quantity</td>
<td>How many you want to purchase</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>product_id</td>
<td>Sello product id</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>price_each</td>
<td>Purchase price per each</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>name</td>
<td>Product&#39;s private name</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>sku</td>
<td>Product&#39;s private reference</td>
</tr>
</tbody></table>
<h2 id='add-an-order-row'>Add an order row</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/purchaseorders/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">/rows"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">json_encode</span><span class="p">(</span>
<span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s2">"products"</span><span class="o">:</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="p">[</span> <span class="s2">"id"</span> <span class="o">=&gt;</span> <span class="mi">39407525</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"quantity"</span> <span class="o">=&gt;</span> <span class="mi">10</span><span class="p">],</span>
<span class="p">[</span> <span class="s2">"id"</span> <span class="o">=&gt;</span> <span class="mi">38504479</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"quantity"</span> <span class="o">=&gt;</span> <span class="mi">5</span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="p">]</span>
<span class="p">]</span>
<span class="p">));</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/purchaseorders/{id}/rows"</span> <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> POST <span class="nt">-d</span> <span class="s1">'{"products": [{ "id": 39407525, "quantity": 10}, {"id": 38504479, "quantity": 5}]}'</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command returns all the rows in the order like this:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">13196</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"product_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">39407525</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"quantity"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">10</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"price_each"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mf">0.14</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"My test product 1"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"sku"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"TEST1"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">13197</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"product_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">38504479</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"quantity"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">5</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"price_each"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mf">0.53</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"My test product 2"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"sku"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"TEST2"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">13198</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"product_id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">39407525</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"quantity"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">10</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"price_each"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mf">4.32</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"My test product 3"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"sku"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"TEST3"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint will add an rows to an existing order. The price for each row is fetched from product&#39;s purchase price field and converted from your account&#39;s currency to the order currency (specified by the supplier&#39;s currency).</p>

<p>Required fields are:</p>

<p>An array of objects with:</p>

<ul>
<li>product_id (the Sello product id)</li>
<li>quantity (how many to purchase)</li>
</ul>
<h3 id='http-request-7'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>POST https://api.sello.io/v5/purchaseorders/{id}/rows</code></p>
<h2 id='change-purchase-order-rows'>Change purchase order rows</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/purchaseorders/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">/rows"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'PUT'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'[{"id": 13010, "quantity": 10},{"id": 13011, "quantity": 40}]'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>
</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> PUT https://api.sello.io/v5/purchaseorders/<span class="o">{</span><span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">}</span>/rows <span class="nt">-d</span> <span class="s1">'[{"id": 13010, "quantity": 10},{"id": 13011, "quantity": 40}]'</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>200</code> if successful</p>
</blockquote>

<p>This endpoint will update the rows specified in your array. You must supply an id for each row you want to update. Only send the attributes you wish to update, the other attributes will remain unchanged.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-8'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>PUT https://api.sello.io/v5/purchaseorders/{id}/rows</code></p>
<h3 id='supported-attributes-2'>Supported attributes</h3>
<p>The following attributes may be updated, any other attributes will be silently ignored and unchanged.</p>

<ul>
<li>price_each</li>
<li>quantity</li>
</ul>
<h2 id='delete-a-purchase-order-row'>Delete a purchase order row</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/purchaseorders/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">orderId}/rows/{rowId</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'DELETE'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>
</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> DELETE https://api.sello.io/v5/purchaseorders/<span class="o">{</span>orderId<span class="o">}</span>/rows/<span class="o">{</span>rowId<span class="o">}</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>200</code> if successful</p>
</blockquote>

<p>This endpoint will delete a row from your order. You are not allowed to delete rows from orders that have &quot;received&quot; state.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-9'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>DELETE https://api.sello.io/v5/purchaseorders/{orderId}/rows/{rowId}</code></p>
<h2 id='getting-purchase-order-excel-file'>Getting purchase order Excel file</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/purchaseorders/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">/xlsx"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/purchaseorders/{id}/xlsx"</span> <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command returns JSON structured like this:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"url"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"https://s3-eu-west-1.amazonaws.com/sello-tmp/purchaseorder/834/ds2471j.xlsx"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint will return an object with an url attribute where you can get the generated file.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-10'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/purchaseorders/{id}/xlsx</code></p>
<h1 id='settings'>Settings</h1><h2 id='getting-settings'>Getting settings</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/settings/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">keys</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/settings/{keys}"</span> <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command returns JSON structured like this:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"shipping_tax"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"12"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"mail_send_copy"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"0"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint will retrieve the supplied setting keys as an object. To fetch multiple settings, simply separate setting keys by comma (like <code>https://api.sello.io/v5/settings/shipping_tax,mail_send_copy</code>. If a key doesn&#39;t have a setting, it&#39;s default value will be returned.</p>
<h3 id='http-request'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/settings/shipping_tax,mail_send_copy</code></p>
<h2 id='update-settings'>Update settings</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/settings"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'{"shipping_tax":"25", "mail_send_copy": "1"}'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> POST <span class="nt">-d</span> <span class="s1">'{"shipping_tax":"25", "mail_send_copy": "1"}'</span> https://api.sello.io/v5/settings
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>200</code> and return the updated settings object:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"shipping_tax"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"25"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"mail_send_copy"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"1"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint will update settings provided in the object.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-2'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>PUT https://api.sello.io/v5/settings</code></p>
<h1 id='shipping'>Shipping</h1><h2 id='get-unifaun-settings'>Get Unifaun settings</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/shipping/unifaun/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/shipping/unifaun/{id}"</span> <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command returns JSON structured like this:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"sender"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"phone"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"+46123456789"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Sell-o AB"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"address"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Kungsgatan 88"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"zip"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"80292"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"city"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Gävle"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"country"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"SE"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"email"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"support@sello.io"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"accountType"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"standard"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"mediaSettings"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"target1Media"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"thermo-se"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"target1XOffset"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"target1YOffset"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"target2Media"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"laser-ste"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"target2XOffset"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"target2YOffset"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"target3Media"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">null</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"target3XOffset"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"target3YOffset"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"target4Media"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">null</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"target4XOffset"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"target4YOffset"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint will retrieve settings for the specified Unifaun integration.</p>
<h3 id='http-request'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/shipping/unifaun/{id}</code></p>
<h2 id='update-unifaun-settings'>Update Unifaun settings</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/shipping/unifaun/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'PUT'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'{ "sender": { "phone": "+46123456789", "name": "Sell-o AB", "address": "Kungsgatan 88", "zip": "80292", "city": "Gävle", "country": "SE", "email": "support@sello.io" }, "accountType": "plus", "mediaSettings": { "target1Media": "thermo-se", "target1XOffset": 0, "target1YOffset": 0, "target2Media": "laser-ste", "target2XOffset": 0, "target2YOffset": 0, "target3Media": null, "target3XOffset": 0, "target3YOffset": 0, "target4Media": null, "target4XOffset": 0, "target4YOffset": 0 }}'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> PUT <span class="nt">-d</span> <span class="s1">'{ "sender": { "phone": "+46123456789", "name": "Sell-o AB", "address": "Kungsgatan 88", "zip": "80292", "city": "Gävle", "country": "SE", "email": "support@sello.io" }, "accountType": "standard", "mediaSettings": { "target1Media": "thermo-se", "target1XOffset": 0, "target1YOffset": 0, "target2Media": "laser-ste", "target2XOffset": 0, "target2YOffset": 0, "target3Media": null, "target3XOffset": 0, "target3YOffset": 0, "target4Media": null, "target4XOffset": 0, "target4YOffset": 0 }}'</span> https://api.sello.io/v5/shipping/unifaun/<span class="o">{</span><span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">}</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>204</code> and no output</p>
</blockquote>

<p>This endpoint will update settings for a specified Unifaun integration. To edit, simply PUT back the data you GET.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-2'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>PUT https://api.sello.io/v5/shipping/unifaun/{id}</code></p>
<h2 id='get-all-unifaun-transporters'>Get all Unifaun transporters</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/shipping/unifaun/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">/transporters"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>
