<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> POST <span class="nt">-d</span> <span class="s1">'{"name":"Standard tax", "rules": {"4": {"SE": "25.00"}}}'</span> https://api.sello.io/v5/tax
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>201</code> and return the created tax class:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"id"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"RFH0vZF"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"name"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"Standard tax"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"rules"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"4"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"SE"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"25.00"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"5"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"SE"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"25.00"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"NO"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"20.1"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"FI"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"12.9"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint will add a tax class.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-3'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>POST https://api.sello.io/v5/tax</code></p>
<h3 id='data'>Data</h3>
<table><thead>
<tr>
<th>Parameter</th>
<th>Required?</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead><tbody>
<tr>
<td>name</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>The class name, for internal reference - will not be exposed externally</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>rules</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>An object of integration id, country and the tax rate: <code>{ &quot;integration&quot;: {&quot;country&quot;: &quot;rate&quot;}}</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody></table>
<h2 id='change-a-tax-class'>Change a tax class</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/tax/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'PUT'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'{"name":"Standard tax 2", "rules": {"4": {"SE": "25.00"}}}'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>
</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> PUT https://api.sello.io/v5/tax/<span class="o">{</span><span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">}</span> <span class="nt">-d</span> <span class="s1">'{"name":"Standard tax 2", "rules": {"4": {"SE": "25.00"}}}'</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>200</code> if successful</p>
</blockquote>

<p>This endpoint will update a tax class. </p>
<h3 id='http-request-4'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>PUT https://api.sello.io/v5/tax/{id}</code></p>
<h2 id='remove-a-tax-class'>Remove a tax class</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/tax/</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nv">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'DELETE'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>
</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> DELETE https://api.sello.io/v5/tax/<span class="o">{</span><span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">}</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>204</code> if successful</p>
</blockquote>

<p>This endpoint will remove a tax class. If a class is in use by a product, you will return a <code>409 Conflict</code> error.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-5'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>DELETE https://api.sello.io/v5/tax/{id}</code></p>
<h1 id='webhooks'>Webhooks</h1>
<p>Webhooks allow you to collect information about events as they happen in near real-time. Provide a URL and what event you want to receive data about, and we’ll send it to you as the events take place.</p>

<p>You may specify multiple url&#39;s for the same hooks. For example, <code>orderNew</code> can be delivered to two url&#39;s if you wish.</p>

<p>Webhooks allow you to collect information about events as they happen in near real-time. Provide a URL and what event you want to receive data about, and we’ll send it to you as the events take place.</p>

<p>To test our Webhooks before setting up scripts, the <a href="http://www.webhooks.org/">RequestBin</a> tool is an excellent utility that helps you see data come across as various events happen in our system.</p>
<h2 id='configuring-webhooks'>Configuring webhooks</h2>
<p>Webhooks are configured from your Sello account. Here are the basic steps:</p>

<ol>
<li>Log in to your Sello account</li>
<li>Navigate to Settings</li>
<li>Click Developers -&gt; WebHooks</li>
</ol>

<p>Configuration is simple: Enter a valid url for us to contact, then select the event and you want to have sent to you.</p>
<h2 id='securing-webhooks'>Securing webhooks</h2>
<p>We currently support either HTTP or HTTPS urls, so you can have security by using an SSL-enabled url. But keep in mind that your endpoint is going to be wide-open on the internet, and you might not want others to be able to submit random data to your systems. At this time, aside from trying to keep the URL private, our best suggestion is to simply include a secret key in the URL your provide and check that parameter in your scripts.</p>
<h2 id='supported-events'>Supported events</h2>
<p>Our Webhooks implementation currently support the following events:</p>

<ul>
<li>New order (also triggered if an order is updated)</li>
<li>Paid order</li>
<li>Updated order</li>
<li>Product update</li>
<li>Product quantity update</li>
</ul>
<h2 id='event-data'>Event data</h2>
<p>When an event occurs that you have turned on, we’ll send a HTTP POST request to the URL you’ve specified. If that URL is unavailable, returns a 500-ish status code or takes too long to respond (more than 15 seconds), we’ll cancel the request and try again later. Retries happen over the course of one hour and 15 minutes. This may be tweaked as we receive feedback from users.</p>

<p>The webhook that Sello send will only contain the ID of the order or the ID of the product that is triggering the webhook. You will then need to fetch the actual data from Sello API v5 with that product ID or order ID.</p>
<h2 id='get-all-webhooks'>Get all webhooks</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/developers/webhooks"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/developers/webhooks"</span> <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command returns JSON structured like this:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"url"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"http://requestb.in/1am97l1"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"hook"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"productUpdated"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"url"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"http://requestb.in/1am97l1"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"hook"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"orderNew"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"url"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"http://requestb.in/yqg5mtq"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"hook"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"orderNew"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"url"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"http://requestb.in/1am97l1"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"hook"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"productUpdated"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint will retrieve all webhooks that have been set up on your account.</p>
<h3 id='http-request'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>GET https://api.sello.io/v5/developers/webhooks</code></p>
<h2 id='add-a-webhook'>Add a webhook</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/developers/webhooks"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'{ "hook": "orderNew", "url": "http://requestb.in/1e6yy7j1" }'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>

</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> POST <span class="nt">-d</span> <span class="s1">'{ "hook": "orderNew", "url": "http://requestb.in/1e6yy7j1" }'</span> https://api.sello.io/v5/developers/webhooks
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>201</code> and return all webhooks:</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight json tab-json"><code><span class="p">[</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"url"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"http://requestb.in/1am97l1"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"hook"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"productUpdated"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"url"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"http://requestb.in/1am97l1"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"hook"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"orderNew"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"url"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"http://requestb.in/yqg5mtq"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"hook"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"orderNew"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"url"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"http://requestb.in/1am97l1"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"hook"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"productUpdated"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">},</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">{</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"url"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"http://requestb.in/1e6yy7j1"</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="nl">"hook"</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s2">"orderNew"</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">}</span><span class="w">
</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="w">
</span></code></pre></div>
<p>This endpoint will add a webhook.</p>
<h3 id='http-request-2'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>POST https://api.sello.io/v5/developers/webhooks</code></p>
<h3 id='data'>Data</h3>
<table><thead>
<tr>
<th>Parameter</th>
<th>Required?</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead><tbody>
<tr>
<td>hook</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>The type of webhook. Supported values are: <code>orderNew</code>, <code>orderPaid</code>, <code>orderUpdated</code>, <code>productUpdated</code>, <code>productQuantityUpdated</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>url</td>
<td>yes</td>
<td>The URL where the hooks should be dispatched. When you add the hook, Sello will attempt to POST to the url. The resulting status should be in the 200-ish range.</td>
</tr>
</tbody></table>
<h2 id='change-webhooks'>Change webhooks</h2><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight php tab-php"><code><span class="cp">&lt;?php</span>
<span class="nv">$handle</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_init</span><span class="p">();</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_URL</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"https://api.sello.io/v5/developers/webhooks"</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="kc">true</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'PUT'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'[{"url": "http://requestb.in/1am97li1","hook": "productUpdated" }, {"url": "http://requestb.in/1am97li1","hook": "orderNew" }, {"url": "http://requestb.in/yqg5mtyqaa","hook": "orderNew" }, {"url": "http://requestb.in/1am97li1","hook": "productUpdated" }, {"url": "http://requestb.in/1e6yy7j1","hook": "orderNew" }]'</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nb">curl_setopt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[</span>
<span class="s1">'Accept: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Content-Type: application/json'</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="s1">'Authorization: meowmeowmeow'</span>
<span class="p">]);</span>

<span class="nv">$response</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_exec</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">);</span>
<span class="nv">$code</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">curl_getinfo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nv">$handle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="no">CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE</span><span class="p">);</span>

<span class="k">echo</span> <span class="s2">"Code: </span><span class="nv">$code</span><span class="s2">, response: </span><span class="nv">$response</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="p">;</span>
</code></pre></div><div class="highlight"><pre class="highlight shell tab-shell"><code>curl <span class="nt">-H</span> <span class="s2">"Authorization: meowmeowmeow"</span> <span class="nt">-X</span> PUT https://api.sello.io/v5/developers/webhooks <span class="nt">-d</span> <span class="s1">'[{"url": "http://requestb.in/1am97li1","hook": "productUpdated" }, {"url": "http://requestb.in/1am97li1","hook": "orderNew" }, {"url": "http://requestb.in/yqg5mtyqaa","hook": "orderNew" }, {"url": "http://requestb.in/1am97li1","hook": "productUpdated" }, {"url": "http://requestb.in/1e6yy7j1","hook": "orderNew" }]'</span>
</code></pre></div>
<blockquote>
<p>The above command will respond with status <code>200</code> if successful</p>
</blockquote>

<p>This endpoint will update your webhooks. The url is validated an tested (we&#39;ll issue a POST request)</p>
<h3 id='http-request-3'>HTTP Request</h3>
<p><code>PUT https://api.sello.io/v5/developers/webhooks</code></p>
<h3 id='data-2'>Data</h3>
<p>Send the full data you&#39;re getting from <code>GET</code> on this resource.</p>
<h2 id='remove-a-webhook'>Remove a webhook</h2>
<p>Simply <code>PUT</code> the data with the hook removed from the data.</p>

</div>
<div class="dark-box">
<div class="lang-selector">
<a href="#" data-language-name="php">php</a>
<a href="#" data-language-name="shell">shell</a>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</body>
</html>
